;;;3254   HAL_StatusTypeDef ADC_ConversionStop(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, uint32_t ConversionGroup)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;3255   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;3256     uint32_t tickstart;
;;;3257     uint32_t Conversion_Timeout_CPU_cycles = 0UL;
000006  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;3258     uint32_t conversion_group_reassigned = ConversionGroup;
000008  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;3259     uint32_t tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART;
;;;3260     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular;
;;;3261     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected;
;;;3262   
;;;3263     /* Check the parameters */
;;;3264     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;3265     assert_param(IS_ADC_CONVERSION_GROUP(ConversionGroup));
;;;3266   
;;;3267     /* Verification if ADC is not already stopped (on regular and injected      */
;;;3268     /* groups) to bypass this function if not needed.                           */
;;;3269     tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular = LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
00000a  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
000010  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;3270     tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected = LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
000012  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000014  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing
;;;3271     if ((tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular != 0UL)
000018  4330              ORRS     r0,r0,r6
00001a  d05d              BEQ      |L1.216|
;;;3272         || (tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected != 0UL)
;;;3273        )
;;;3274     {
;;;3275       /* Particular case of continuous auto-injection mode combined with        */
;;;3276       /* auto-delay mode.                                                       */
;;;3277       /* In auto-injection mode, regular group stop ADC_CR_ADSTP is used (not   */
;;;3278       /* injected group stop ADC_CR_JADSTP).                                    */
;;;3279       /* Procedure to be followed: Wait until JEOS=1, clear JEOS, set ADSTP=1   */
;;;3280       /* (see reference manual).                                                */
;;;3281       if (((hadc->Instance->CFGR & ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
00001c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00001e  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]
000020  4e2e              LDR      r6,|L1.220|
000022  0189              LSLS     r1,r1,#6
000024  d505              BPL      |L1.50|
;;;3282           && (hadc->Init.ContinuousConvMode == ENABLE)
000026  7e61              LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x19]
000028  2901              CMP      r1,#1
00002a  d102              BNE      |L1.50|
;;;3283           && (hadc->Init.LowPowerAutoWait == ENABLE)
00002c  7e21              LDRB     r1,[r4,#0x18]
00002e  2901              CMP      r1,#1
000030  d00b              BEQ      |L1.74|
                  |L1.50|
;;;3284          )
;;;3285       {
;;;3286         /* Use stop of regular group */
;;;3287         conversion_group_reassigned = ADC_REGULAR_GROUP;
;;;3288   
;;;3289         /* Wait until JEOS=1 (maximum Timeout: 4 injected conversions) */
;;;3290         while (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOS) == 0UL)
;;;3291         {
;;;3292           if (Conversion_Timeout_CPU_cycles >= (ADC_CONVERSION_TIME_MAX_CPU_CYCLES * 4UL))
;;;3293           {
;;;3294             /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3295             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3296   
;;;3297             /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3298             SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3299   
;;;3300             return HAL_ERROR;
;;;3301           }
;;;3302           Conversion_Timeout_CPU_cycles ++;
;;;3303         }
;;;3304   
;;;3305         /* Clear JEOS */
;;;3306         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOS);
;;;3307       }
;;;3308   
;;;3309       /* Stop potential conversion on going on ADC group regular */
;;;3310       if (conversion_group_reassigned != ADC_INJECTED_GROUP)
000032  2d02              CMP      r5,#2
000034  d01d              BEQ      |L1.114|
                  |L1.54|
;;;3311       {
;;;3312         /* Software is allowed to set ADSTP only when ADSTART=1 and ADDIS=0 */
;;;3313         if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
000036  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000038  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
00003c  b1b8              CBZ      r0,|L1.110|
00003e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000040  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000042  f3c10140          UBFX     r1,r1,#1,#1
;;;3314         {
;;;3315           if (LL_ADC_IsDisableOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000046  b169              CBZ      r1,|L1.100|
000048  e011              B        |L1.110|
                  |L1.74|
00004a  2501              MOVS     r5,#1                 ;3287
00004c  4924              LDR      r1,|L1.224|
00004e  e002              B        |L1.86|
                  |L1.80|
000050  428f              CMP      r7,r1                 ;3292
000052  d232              BCS      |L1.186|
000054  1c7f              ADDS     r7,r7,#1              ;3292
                  |L1.86|
000056  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]            ;3290
000058  43d2              MVNS     r2,r2                 ;3290
00005a  0652              LSLS     r2,r2,#25             ;3290
00005c  d4f8              BMI      |L1.80|
00005e  2140              MOVS     r1,#0x40              ;3306
000060  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;3306
000062  e7e8              B        |L1.54|
                  |L1.100|
000064  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;3306
000066  4031              ANDS     r1,r1,r6              ;3306
000068  f0410110          ORR      r1,r1,#0x10           ;3306
00006c  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;3306
                  |L1.110|
;;;3316           {
;;;3317             /* Stop ADC group regular conversion */
;;;3318             LL_ADC_REG_StopConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;3319           }
;;;3320         }
;;;3321       }
;;;3322   
;;;3323       /* Stop potential conversion on going on ADC group injected */
;;;3324       if (conversion_group_reassigned != ADC_REGULAR_GROUP)
00006e  2d01              CMP      r5,#1
000070  d011              BEQ      |L1.150|
                  |L1.114|
;;;3325       {
;;;3326         /* Software is allowed to set JADSTP only when JADSTART=1 and ADDIS=0 */
;;;3327         if (LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
000072  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000074  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing
000078  b148              CBZ      r0,|L1.142|
00007a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00007c  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
00007e  f3c10140          UBFX     r1,r1,#1,#1
;;;3328         {
;;;3329           if (LL_ADC_IsDisableOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000082  b921              CBNZ     r1,|L1.142|
000084  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000086  4031              ANDS     r1,r1,r6
000088  f0410120          ORR      r1,r1,#0x20
00008c  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]
                  |L1.142|
;;;3330           {
;;;3331             /* Stop ADC group injected conversion */
;;;3332             LL_ADC_INJ_StopConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;3333           }
;;;3334         }
;;;3335       }
;;;3336   
;;;3337       /* Selection of start and stop bits with respect to the regular or injected group */
;;;3338       switch (conversion_group_reassigned)
00008e  2d02              CMP      r5,#2
000090  d008              BEQ      |L1.164|
000092  2d03              CMP      r5,#3
000094  d004              BEQ      |L1.160|
                  |L1.150|
;;;3339       {
;;;3340         case ADC_REGULAR_INJECTED_GROUP:
;;;3341           tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART = (ADC_CR_ADSTART | ADC_CR_JADSTART);
;;;3342           break;
;;;3343         case ADC_INJECTED_GROUP:
;;;3344           tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART = ADC_CR_JADSTART;
;;;3345           break;
;;;3346         /* Case ADC_REGULAR_GROUP only*/
;;;3347         default:
;;;3348           tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART = ADC_CR_ADSTART;
000096  2504              MOVS     r5,#4
                  |L1.152|
;;;3349           break;
;;;3350       }
;;;3351   
;;;3352       /* Wait for conversion effectively stopped */
;;;3353       tickstart = HAL_GetTick();
000098  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
00009c  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;3354   
;;;3355       while ((hadc->Instance->CR & tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART) != 0UL)
00009e  e017              B        |L1.208|
                  |L1.160|
0000a0  250c              MOVS     r5,#0xc               ;3341
0000a2  e7f9              B        |L1.152|
                  |L1.164|
0000a4  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;3344
0000a6  e7f7              B        |L1.152|
                  |L1.168|
;;;3356       {
;;;3357         if ((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > ADC_STOP_CONVERSION_TIMEOUT)
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
0000ac  1b80              SUBS     r0,r0,r6
0000ae  2805              CMP      r0,#5
0000b0  d90e              BLS      |L1.208|
;;;3358         {
;;;3359           /* New check to avoid false timeout detection in case of preemption */
;;;3360           if ((hadc->Instance->CR & tmp_ADC_CR_ADSTART_JADSTART) != 0UL)
0000b2  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
0000b4  6880              LDR      r0,[r0,#8]
0000b6  4228              TST      r0,r5
0000b8  d00a              BEQ      |L1.208|
                  |L1.186|
;;;3361           {
;;;3362             /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3363             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
0000ba  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
0000bc  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
0000c0  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;3364   
;;;3365             /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3366             SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
0000c2  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
0000c4  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
0000c8  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
;;;3367   
;;;3368             return HAL_ERROR;
0000ca  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L1.204|
;;;3369           }
;;;3370         }
;;;3371       }
;;;3372   
;;;3373     }
;;;3374   
;;;3375     /* Return HAL status */
;;;3376     return HAL_OK;
;;;3377   }
0000cc  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
                  |L1.208|
0000d0  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;3355
0000d2  6880              LDR      r0,[r0,#8]            ;3355
0000d4  4228              TST      r0,r5                 ;3355
0000d6  d1e7              BNE      |L1.168|
                  |L1.216|
0000d8  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3376
0000da  e7f7              B        |L1.204|
;;;3378   
                          ENDP

                  |L1.220|

                  |L1.224|

                          AREA ||i.ADC_DMAConvCplt||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  ADC_DMAConvCplt PROC
;;;3539     */
;;;3540   void ADC_DMAConvCplt(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;3541   {
;;;3542     /* Retrieve ADC handle corresponding to current DMA handle */
;;;3543     ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc = (ADC_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;
;;;3544   
;;;3545     /* Update state machine on conversion status if not in error state */
;;;3546     if ((hadc->State & (HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL | HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_DMA)) == 0UL)
000002  6a84              LDR      r4,[r0,#0x28]
000004  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]
000006  f0110f50          TST      r1,#0x50
00000a  d006              BEQ      |L2.26|
;;;3547     {
;;;3548       /* Set ADC state */
;;;3549       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC);
;;;3550   
;;;3551       /* Determine whether any further conversion upcoming on group regular     */
;;;3552       /* by external trigger, continuous mode or scan sequence on going         */
;;;3553       /* to disable interruption.                                               */
;;;3554       /* Is it the end of the regular sequence ? */
;;;3555       if ((hadc->Instance->ISR & ADC_FLAG_EOS) != 0UL)
;;;3556       {
;;;3557         /* Are conversions software-triggered ? */
;;;3558         if (LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
;;;3559         {
;;;3560           /* Is CONT bit set ? */
;;;3561           if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_CONT) == 0UL)
;;;3562           {
;;;3563             /* CONT bit is not set, no more conversions expected */
;;;3564             CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;3565             if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) == 0UL)
;;;3566             {
;;;3567               SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;3568             }
;;;3569           }
;;;3570         }
;;;3571       }
;;;3572       else
;;;3573       {
;;;3574         /* DMA End of Transfer interrupt was triggered but conversions sequence
;;;3575            is not over. If DMACFG is set to 0, conversions are stopped. */
;;;3576         if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_DMACFG) == 0UL)
;;;3577         {
;;;3578           /* DMACFG bit is not set, conversions are stopped. */
;;;3579           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;3580           if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) == 0UL)
;;;3581           {
;;;3582             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;3583           }
;;;3584         }
;;;3585       }
;;;3586   
;;;3587       /* Conversion complete callback */
;;;3588   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;3589       hadc->ConvCpltCallback(hadc);
;;;3590   #else
;;;3591       HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback(hadc);
;;;3592   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;3593     }
;;;3594     else /* DMA and-or internal error occurred */
;;;3595     {
;;;3596       if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL) != 0UL)
00000c  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]
00000e  06c9              LSLS     r1,r1,#27
000010  d525              BPL      |L2.94|
;;;3597       {
;;;3598         /* Call HAL ADC Error Callback function */
;;;3599   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;3600         hadc->ErrorCallback(hadc);
;;;3601   #else
;;;3602         HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback(hadc);
000012  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000014  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback
;;;3603   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;3604       }
;;;3605       else
;;;3606       {
;;;3607         /* Call ADC DMA error callback */
;;;3608         hadc->DMA_Handle->XferErrorCallback(hdma);
;;;3609       }
;;;3610     }
;;;3611   }
000018  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L2.26|
00001a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;3549
00001c  f4407000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x200          ;3549
000020  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;3549
000022  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;3555
000024  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;3555
000026  0709              LSLS     r1,r1,#28             ;3555

00002a  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart
00002e  b178              CBZ      r0,|L2.80|
000030  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;3561
000032  68c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0xc]          ;3561
000034  0480              LSLS     r0,r0,#18             ;3561

000036  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;3576
000038  db0a              BLT      |L2.80|

00003c  f4207080          BIC      r0,r0,#0x100          ;3579

;;;3636   void ADC_DMAError(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma)

;;;3637   {
;;;3638     /* Retrieve ADC handle corresponding to current DMA handle */
;;;3639     ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc = (ADC_HandleTypeDef *)((DMA_HandleTypeDef *)hdma)->Parent;

;;;3640   
;;;3641     /* Set ADC state */
;;;3642     SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_DMA);
000004  6d41              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x54]
000006  f0410140          ORR      r1,r1,#0x40
00000a  6541              STR      r1,[r0,#0x54]
;;;3643   
;;;3644     /* Set ADC error code to DMA error */
;;;3645     SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_DMA);

;;;3646

;;;3648   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;3649     hadc->ErrorCallback(hadc);
;;;3650   #else

;;;3652   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;3653   }

;;;3654

                          AREA ||i.ADC_Disable||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  ADC_Disable PROC
;;;3477     */
;;;3478   HAL_StatusTypeDef ADC_Disable(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;3479   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;3480     uint32_t tickstart;
;;;3481     const uint32_t tmp_adc_is_disable_on_going = LL_ADC_IsDisableOngoing(hadc->Instance);
000004  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000006  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000008  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]
00000a  f3c10140          UBFX     r1,r1,#1,#1
00000e  f0120f01          TST      r2,#1
000012  d028              BEQ      |L5.102|
;;;3482   
;;;3483     /* Verification if ADC is not already disabled:                             */
;;;3484     /* Note: forbidden to disable ADC (set bit ADC_CR_ADDIS) if ADC is already  */
;;;3485     /*       disabled.                                                          */
;;;3486     if ((LL_ADC_IsEnabled(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
;;;3487         && (tmp_adc_is_disable_on_going == 0UL)
000014  bb39              CBNZ     r1,|L5.102|
;;;3488        )
;;;3489     {
;;;3490       /* Check if conditions to disable the ADC are fulfilled */
;;;3491       if ((hadc->Instance->CR & (ADC_CR_JADSTART | ADC_CR_ADSTART | ADC_CR_ADEN)) == ADC_CR_ADEN)
000016  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000018  f001010d          AND      r1,r1,#0xd
00001c  2901              CMP      r1,#1
00001e  d114              BNE      |L5.74|
000020  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000022  4a12              LDR      r2,|L5.108|
000024  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2
000026  1c89              ADDS     r1,r1,#2
000028  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]
;;;3492       {
;;;3493         /* Disable the ADC peripheral */
;;;3494         LL_ADC_Disable(hadc->Instance);
;;;3495         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOSMP | ADC_FLAG_RDY));
00002a  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00002c  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
00002e  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
;;;3496       }
;;;3497       else
;;;3498       {
;;;3499         /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3500         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3501   
;;;3502         /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3503         SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3504   
;;;3505         return HAL_ERROR;
;;;3506       }
;;;3507   
;;;3508       /* Wait for ADC effectively disabled */
;;;3509       /* Get tick count */
;;;3510       tickstart = HAL_GetTick();
000030  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
000034  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000036  e012              B        |L5.94|
                  |L5.56|
;;;3511   
;;;3512       while ((hadc->Instance->CR & ADC_CR_ADEN) != 0UL)
;;;3513       {
;;;3514         if ((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > ADC_DISABLE_TIMEOUT)
000038  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
00003c  1b40              SUBS     r0,r0,r5
00003e  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000040  d90d              BLS      |L5.94|
;;;3515         {
;;;3516           /* New check to avoid false timeout detection in case of preemption */
;;;3517           if ((hadc->Instance->CR & ADC_CR_ADEN) != 0UL)
000042  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000044  6880              LDR      r0,[r0,#8]
000046  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
000048  d009              BEQ      |L5.94|
                  |L5.74|
;;;3518           {
;;;3519             /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3520             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
00004a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00004c  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
000050  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;3521   
;;;3522             /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3523             SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
000052  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
000054  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
000058  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
;;;3524   
;;;3525             return HAL_ERROR;
00005a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3526           }
;;;3527         }
;;;3528       }
;;;3529     }
;;;3530   
;;;3531     /* Return HAL status */
;;;3532     return HAL_OK;
;;;3533   }
00005c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L5.94|
00005e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;3512
000060  6880              LDR      r0,[r0,#8]            ;3512
000062  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31             ;3512
000064  d1e8              BNE      |L5.56|
                  |L5.102|
000066  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3532
000068  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;3534   
                          ENDP

00006a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L5.108|
                          DCD      0x7fffffc0

                          AREA ||i.ADC_Enable||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  ADC_Enable PROC
;;;3385     */
;;;3386   HAL_StatusTypeDef ADC_Enable(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;3387   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;3388     uint32_t tickstart;
;;;3389     __IO uint32_t wait_loop_index = 0UL;
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;3390   
;;;3391     /* ADC enable and wait for ADC ready (in case of ADC is disabled or         */
;;;3392     /* enabling phase not yet completed: flag ADC ready not yet set).           */
;;;3393     /* Timeout implemented to not be stuck if ADC cannot be enabled (possible   */
;;;3394     /* causes: ADC clock not running, ...).                                     */
;;;3395     if (LL_ADC_IsEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000006  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
000008  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00000a  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
00000c  f0110f01          TST      r1,#1
000010  d141              BNE      |L6.150|
;;;3396     {
;;;3397       /* Check if conditions to enable the ADC are fulfilled */
;;;3398       if ((hadc->Instance->CR & (ADC_CR_ADCAL | ADC_CR_JADSTP | ADC_CR_ADSTP | ADC_CR_JADSTART | ADC_CR_ADSTART
000012  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000014  4a21              LDR      r2,|L6.156|
000016  4211              TST      r1,r2
000018  d12e              BNE      |L6.120|
00001a  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
00001c  43d5              MVNS     r5,r2
00001e  4029              ANDS     r1,r1,r5
000020  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000022  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]
000024  481e              LDR      r0,|L6.160|
000026  6880              LDR      r0,[r0,#8]
000028  f00070e0          AND      r0,r0,#0x1c00000
;;;3399                                  | ADC_CR_ADDIS | ADC_CR_ADEN)) != 0UL)
;;;3400       {
;;;3401         /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3402         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3403   
;;;3404         /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3405         SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;3406   
;;;3407         return HAL_ERROR;
;;;3408       }
;;;3409   
;;;3410       /* Enable the ADC peripheral */
;;;3411       LL_ADC_Enable(hadc->Instance);
;;;3412   
;;;3413       if((LL_ADC_GetCommonPathInternalCh(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance)) & LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_TEMPSENSOR) != 0UL)
00002c  0200              LSLS     r0,r0,#8
00002e  d50d              BPL      |L6.76|
;;;3414       {
;;;3415         /* Delay for temperature sensor buffer stabilization time */
;;;3416         /* Note: Value LL_ADC_DELAY_TEMPSENSOR_STAB_US used instead of      */
;;;3417         /*       LL_ADC_DELAY_TEMPSENSOR_BUFFER_STAB_US because needed      */
;;;3418         /*       in case of ADC enable after a system wake up               */
;;;3419         /*       from low power mode.                                       */
;;;3420   
;;;3421         /* Wait loop initialization and execution */
;;;3422         /* Note: Variable divided by 2 to compensate partially              */
;;;3423         /*       CPU processing cycles, scaling in us split to not          */
;;;3424         /*       exceed 32 bits register capacity and handle low frequency. */
;;;3425         wait_loop_index = ((LL_ADC_DELAY_TEMPSENSOR_STAB_US / 10UL) * ((SystemCoreClock / (100000UL * 2UL)) + 1UL));
000030  481c              LDR      r0,|L6.164|
000032  491d              LDR      r1,|L6.168|
000034  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
000036  fbb0f0f1          UDIV     r0,r0,r1
00003a  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
00003c  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1
000040  0080              LSLS     r0,r0,#2
;;;3426         while(wait_loop_index != 0UL)
000042  e000              B        |L6.70|
                  |L6.68|
000044  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1
                  |L6.70|
000046  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;3425
000048  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;3425
00004a  d1fb              BNE      |L6.68|
                  |L6.76|
;;;3427         {
;;;3428           wait_loop_index--;
;;;3429         }
;;;3430       }
;;;3431   
;;;3432       /* Wait for ADC effectively enabled */
;;;3433       tickstart = HAL_GetTick();
00004c  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
000050  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;3434   
;;;3435       while (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_RDY) == 0UL)
000052  e01b              B        |L6.140|
                  |L6.84|
000054  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
000056  f0110f01          TST      r1,#1
;;;3436       {
;;;3437         /*  If ADEN bit is set less than 4 ADC clock cycles after the ADCAL bit
;;;3438             has been cleared (after a calibration), ADEN bit is reset by the
;;;3439             calibration logic.
;;;3440             The workaround is to continue setting ADEN until ADRDY is becomes 1.
;;;3441             Additionally, ADC_ENABLE_TIMEOUT is defined to encompass this
;;;3442             4 ADC clock cycle duration */
;;;3443         /* Note: Test of ADC enabled required due to hardware constraint to     */
;;;3444         /*       not enable ADC if already enabled.                             */
;;;3445         if (LL_ADC_IsEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
00005a  d103              BNE      |L6.100|
00005c  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]
00005e  4029              ANDS     r1,r1,r5
000060  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000062  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]
                  |L6.100|
;;;3446         {
;;;3447           LL_ADC_Enable(hadc->Instance);
;;;3448         }
;;;3449   
;;;3450         if ((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > ADC_ENABLE_TIMEOUT)
000064  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
000068  1b80              SUBS     r0,r0,r6
00006a  2802              CMP      r0,#2
00006c  d90e              BLS      |L6.140|
;;;3451         {
;;;3452           /* New check to avoid false timeout detection in case of preemption */
;;;3453           if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_RDY) == 0UL)
00006e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000070  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000072  43c0              MVNS     r0,r0
000074  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
000076  d009              BEQ      |L6.140|
                  |L6.120|
;;;3454           {
;;;3455             /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3456             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
000078  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00007a  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
00007e  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;3457   
;;;3458             /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;3459             SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
000080  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
000082  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
000086  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
;;;3460   
;;;3461             return HAL_ERROR;
000088  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;3462           }
;;;3463         }
;;;3464       }
;;;3465     }
;;;3466   
;;;3467     /* Return HAL status */
;;;3468     return HAL_OK;
;;;3469   }
00008a  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L6.140|
00008c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;3435
00008e  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;3435
000090  43c9              MVNS     r1,r1                 ;3435
000092  07c9              LSLS     r1,r1,#31             ;3435
000094  d1de              BNE      |L6.84|
                  |L6.150|
000096  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;3468
000098  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
;;;3470   
                          ENDP

00009a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L6.156|
                          DCD      0x8000003f
                  |L6.160|
                          DCD      0x50040300
                  |L6.164|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L6.168|
                          DCD      0x00030d40

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_AnalogWDGConfig||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_AnalogWDGConfig PROC
;;;2955     */
;;;2956   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_AnalogWDGConfig(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, ADC_AnalogWDGConfTypeDef *AnalogWDGConfig)
000000  e92d5ff0          PUSH     {r4-r12,lr}
;;;2957   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;2958     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status = HAL_OK;
;;;2959     uint32_t tmpAWDHighThresholdShifted;
;;;2960     uint32_t tmpAWDLowThresholdShifted;
;;;2961     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular;
;;;2962     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected;
;;;2963   
;;;2964     /* Check the parameters */
;;;2965     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2966     assert_param(IS_ADC_ANALOG_WATCHDOG_NUMBER(AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber));
;;;2967     assert_param(IS_ADC_ANALOG_WATCHDOG_MODE(AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode));
;;;2968     assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(AnalogWDGConfig->ITMode));
;;;2969   
;;;2970     if ((AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REG)     ||
;;;2971         (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_INJEC)   ||
;;;2972         (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REGINJEC))
;;;2973     {
;;;2974       assert_param(IS_ADC_CHANNEL(hadc, AnalogWDGConfig->Channel));
;;;2975     }
;;;2976   
;;;2977     /* Verify thresholds range */
;;;2978     if (hadc->Init.OversamplingMode == ENABLE)
;;;2979     {
;;;2980       /* Case of oversampling enabled: depending on ratio and shift configuration,
;;;2981          analog watchdog thresholds can be higher than ADC resolution.
;;;2982          Verify if thresholds are within maximum thresholds range. */
;;;2983       assert_param(IS_ADC_RANGE(ADC_RESOLUTION_12B, AnalogWDGConfig->HighThreshold));
;;;2984       assert_param(IS_ADC_RANGE(ADC_RESOLUTION_12B, AnalogWDGConfig->LowThreshold));
;;;2985     }
;;;2986     else
;;;2987     {
;;;2988       /* Verify if thresholds are within the selected ADC resolution */
;;;2989       assert_param(IS_ADC_RANGE(ADC_GET_RESOLUTION(hadc), AnalogWDGConfig->HighThreshold));
;;;2990       assert_param(IS_ADC_RANGE(ADC_GET_RESOLUTION(hadc), AnalogWDGConfig->LowThreshold));
;;;2991     }
;;;2992   
;;;2993     /* Process locked */
;;;2994     __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000006  f8900050          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x50]
00000a  460d              MOV      r5,r1                 ;2957
00000c  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0                 ;2958
000010  f44f0740          MOV      r7,#0xc00000          ;2970
000014  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000016  d017              BEQ      |L7.72|
000018  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
00001a  f8846050          STRB     r6,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2995   
;;;2996     /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                              */
;;;2997     /* Parameters that can be updated when ADC is disabled or enabled without   */
;;;2998     /* conversion on going on ADC groups regular and injected:                  */
;;;2999     /*  - Analog watchdog channels                                              */
;;;3000     /*  - Analog watchdog thresholds                                            */
;;;3001     tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular = LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
00001e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000020  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
000024  4680              MOV      r8,r0
;;;3002     tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected = LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
000026  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000028  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing
;;;3003     if ((tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular == 0UL)
00002c  ea580000          ORRS     r0,r8,r0
000030  d00c              BEQ      |L7.76|
;;;3004         && (tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected == 0UL)
;;;3005        )
;;;3006     {
;;;3007       /* Analog watchdog configuration */
;;;3008       if (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_1)
;;;3009       {
;;;3010         /* Configuration of analog watchdog:                                    */
;;;3011         /*  - Set the analog watchdog enable mode: one or overall group of      */
;;;3012         /*    channels, on groups regular and-or injected.                      */
;;;3013         switch (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode)
;;;3014         {
;;;3015           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REG:
;;;3016             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, __LL_ADC_ANALOGWD_CHANNEL_GROUP(AnalogWDGConfig->Channel,
;;;3017                                             LL_ADC_GROUP_REGULAR));
;;;3018             break;
;;;3019   
;;;3020           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_INJEC:
;;;3021             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, __LL_ADC_ANALOGWD_CHANNEL_GROUP(AnalogWDGConfig->Channel,
;;;3022                                             LL_ADC_GROUP_INJECTED));
;;;3023             break;
;;;3024   
;;;3025           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REGINJEC:
;;;3026             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, __LL_ADC_ANALOGWD_CHANNEL_GROUP(AnalogWDGConfig->Channel,
;;;3027                                             LL_ADC_GROUP_REGULAR_INJECTED));
;;;3028             break;
;;;3029   
;;;3030           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_REG:
;;;3031             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, LL_ADC_AWD_ALL_CHANNELS_REG);
;;;3032             break;
;;;3033   
;;;3034           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_INJEC:
;;;3035             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, LL_ADC_AWD_ALL_CHANNELS_INJ);
;;;3036             break;
;;;3037   
;;;3038           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_REGINJEC:
;;;3039             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, LL_ADC_AWD_ALL_CHANNELS_REG_INJ);
;;;3040             break;
;;;3041   
;;;3042           default: /* ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_NONE */
;;;3043             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_AWD1, LL_ADC_AWD_DISABLE);
;;;3044             break;
;;;3045         }
;;;3046   
;;;3047         /* Shift the offset in function of the selected ADC resolution:         */
;;;3048         /* Thresholds have to be left-aligned on bit 11, the LSB (right bits)   */
;;;3049         /* are set to 0                                                         */
;;;3050         tmpAWDHighThresholdShifted = ADC_AWD1THRESHOLD_SHIFT_RESOLUTION(hadc, AnalogWDGConfig->HighThreshold);
;;;3051         tmpAWDLowThresholdShifted  = ADC_AWD1THRESHOLD_SHIFT_RESOLUTION(hadc, AnalogWDGConfig->LowThreshold);
;;;3052   
;;;3053         /* Set ADC analog watchdog thresholds value of both thresholds high and low */
;;;3054         LL_ADC_ConfigAnalogWDThresholds(hadc->Instance, AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber, tmpAWDHighThresholdShifted,
;;;3055                                         tmpAWDLowThresholdShifted);
;;;3056   
;;;3057         /* Update state, clear previous result related to AWD1 */
;;;3058         CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD1);
;;;3059   
;;;3060         /* Clear flag ADC analog watchdog */
;;;3061         /* Note: Flag cleared Clear the ADC Analog watchdog flag to be ready  */
;;;3062         /* to use for HAL_ADC_IRQHandler() or HAL_ADC_PollForEvent()          */
;;;3063         /* (in case left enabled by previous ADC operations).                 */
;;;3064         LL_ADC_ClearFlag_AWD1(hadc->Instance);
;;;3065   
;;;3066         /* Configure ADC analog watchdog interrupt */
;;;3067         if (AnalogWDGConfig->ITMode == ENABLE)
;;;3068         {
;;;3069           LL_ADC_EnableIT_AWD1(hadc->Instance);
;;;3070         }
;;;3071         else
;;;3072         {
;;;3073           LL_ADC_DisableIT_AWD1(hadc->Instance);
;;;3074         }
;;;3075       }
;;;3076       /* Case of ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_2 or ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_3 */
;;;3077       else
;;;3078       {
;;;3079         switch (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogMode)
;;;3080         {
;;;3081           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REG:
;;;3082           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_INJEC:
;;;3083           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_SINGLE_REGINJEC:
;;;3084             /* Update AWD by bitfield to keep the possibility to monitor        */
;;;3085             /* several channels by successive calls of this function.           */
;;;3086             if (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_2)
;;;3087             {
;;;3088               SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->AWD2CR, (1UL << (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(AnalogWDGConfig->Channel) & 0x1FUL)));
;;;3089             }
;;;3090             else
;;;3091             {
;;;3092               SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->AWD3CR, (1UL << (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(AnalogWDGConfig->Channel) & 0x1FUL)));
;;;3093             }
;;;3094             break;
;;;3095   
;;;3096           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_REG:
;;;3097           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_INJEC:
;;;3098           case ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_ALL_REGINJEC:
;;;3099             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber, LL_ADC_AWD_ALL_CHANNELS_REG_INJ);
;;;3100             break;
;;;3101   
;;;3102           default: /* ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_NONE */
;;;3103             LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(hadc->Instance, AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber, LL_ADC_AWD_DISABLE);
;;;3104             break;
;;;3105         }
;;;3106   
;;;3107         /* Shift the thresholds in function of the selected ADC resolution      */
;;;3108         /* have to be left-aligned on bit 7, the LSB (right bits) are set to 0  */
;;;3109         tmpAWDHighThresholdShifted = ADC_AWD23THRESHOLD_SHIFT_RESOLUTION(hadc, AnalogWDGConfig->HighThreshold);
;;;3110         tmpAWDLowThresholdShifted  = ADC_AWD23THRESHOLD_SHIFT_RESOLUTION(hadc, AnalogWDGConfig->LowThreshold);
;;;3111   
;;;3112         /* Set ADC analog watchdog thresholds value of both thresholds high and low */
;;;3113         LL_ADC_ConfigAnalogWDThresholds(hadc->Instance, AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber, tmpAWDHighThresholdShifted,
;;;3114                                         tmpAWDLowThresholdShifted);
;;;3115   
;;;3116         if (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_2)
;;;3117         {
;;;3118           /* Update state, clear previous result related to AWD2 */
;;;3119           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD2);
;;;3120   
;;;3121           /* Clear flag ADC analog watchdog */
;;;3122           /* Note: Flag cleared Clear the ADC Analog watchdog flag to be ready  */
;;;3123           /* to use for HAL_ADC_IRQHandler() or HAL_ADC_PollForEvent()          */
;;;3124           /* (in case left enabled by previous ADC operations).                 */
;;;3125           LL_ADC_ClearFlag_AWD2(hadc->Instance);
;;;3126   
;;;3127           /* Configure ADC analog watchdog interrupt */
;;;3128           if (AnalogWDGConfig->ITMode == ENABLE)
;;;3129           {
;;;3130             LL_ADC_EnableIT_AWD2(hadc->Instance);
;;;3131           }
;;;3132           else
;;;3133           {
;;;3134             LL_ADC_DisableIT_AWD2(hadc->Instance);
;;;3135           }
;;;3136         }
;;;3137         /* (AnalogWDGConfig->WatchdogNumber == ADC_ANALOGWATCHDOG_3) */
;;;3138         else
;;;3139         {
;;;3140           /* Update state, clear previous result related to AWD3 */
;;;3141           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD3);
;;;3142   
;;;3143           /* Clear flag ADC analog watchdog */
;;;3144           /* Note: Flag cleared Clear the ADC Analog watchdog flag to be ready  */
;;;3145           /* to use for HAL_ADC_IRQHandler() or HAL_ADC_PollForEvent()          */
;;;3146           /* (in case left enabled by previous ADC operations).                 */
;;;3147           LL_ADC_ClearFlag_AWD3(hadc->Instance);
;;;3148   
;;;3149           /* Configure ADC analog watchdog interrupt */
;;;3150           if (AnalogWDGConfig->ITMode == ENABLE)
;;;3151           {
;;;3152             LL_ADC_EnableIT_AWD3(hadc->Instance);
;;;3153           }
;;;3154           else
;;;3155           {
;;;3156             LL_ADC_DisableIT_AWD3(hadc->Instance);
;;;3157           }
;;;3158         }
;;;3159       }
;;;3160   
;;;3161     }
;;;3162     /* If a conversion is on going on ADC group regular or injected, no update  */
;;;3163     /* could be done on neither of the AWD configuration structure parameters.  */
;;;3164     else
;;;3165     {
;;;3166       /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;3167       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_CONFIG);
000032  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000034  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
000038  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;3168   
;;;3169       tmp_hal_status = HAL_ERROR;
00003a  46b1              MOV      r9,r6
                  |L7.60|
;;;3170     }
;;;3171     /* Process unlocked */
;;;3172     __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
00003e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;3173   
;;;3174     /* Return function status */
;;;3175     return tmp_hal_status;
000042  4648              MOV      r0,r9
                  |L7.68|
;;;3176   }
000044  e8bd9ff0          POP      {r4-r12,pc}
                  |L7.72|

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_ConfigChannel||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_ConfigChannel PROC
;;;2698     */
;;;2699   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_ConfigChannel(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, ADC_ChannelConfTypeDef *sConfig)
000000  e92d4ff8          PUSH     {r3-r11,lr}
;;;2700   {
;;;2701     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status = HAL_OK;
000004  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
000006  4604              MOV      r4,r0                 ;2700
;;;2702     uint32_t tmpOffsetShifted;
;;;2703     uint32_t tmp_config_internal_channel;
;;;2704     __IO uint32_t wait_loop_index = 0UL;
;;;2705     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular;
;;;2706     uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected;
;;;2707   
;;;2708     /* Check the parameters */
;;;2709     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2710     assert_param(IS_ADC_REGULAR_RANK(sConfig->Rank));
;;;2711     assert_param(IS_ADC_SAMPLE_TIME(sConfig->SamplingTime));
;;;2712     assert_param(IS_ADC_SINGLE_DIFFERENTIAL(sConfig->SingleDiff));
;;;2713     assert_param(IS_ADC_OFFSET_NUMBER(sConfig->OffsetNumber));
;;;2714     assert_param(IS_ADC_RANGE(ADC_GET_RESOLUTION(hadc), sConfig->Offset));
;;;2715   
;;;2716     /* if ROVSE is set, the value of the OFFSETy_EN bit in ADCx_OFRy register is
;;;2717        ignored (considered as reset) */
;;;2718     assert_param(!((sConfig->OffsetNumber != ADC_OFFSET_NONE) && (hadc->Init.OversamplingMode == ENABLE)));
;;;2719   
;;;2720     /* Verification of channel number */
;;;2721     if (sConfig->SingleDiff != ADC_DIFFERENTIAL_ENDED)
;;;2722     {
;;;2723       assert_param(IS_ADC_CHANNEL(hadc, sConfig->Channel));
;;;2724     }
;;;2725     else
;;;2726     {
;;;2727       assert_param(IS_ADC_DIFF_CHANNEL(hadc, sConfig->Channel));
;;;2728     }
;;;2729   
;;;2730     /* Process locked */
;;;2731     __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000008  9700              STR      r7,[sp,#0]
00000a  f8900050          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x50]
00000e  f8df93b0          LDR      r9,|L8.960|
000012  460d              MOV      r5,r1                 ;2700
000014  46b8              MOV      r8,r7                 ;2704
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000018  d011              BEQ      |L8.62|
00001a  2601              MOVS     r6,#1
00001c  f8846050          STRB     r6,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2732   
;;;2733     /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                              */
;;;2734     /* Parameters that can be updated when ADC is disabled or enabled without   */
;;;2735     /* conversion on going on regular group:                                    */
;;;2736     /*  - Channel number                                                        */
;;;2737     /*  - Channel rank                                                          */
;;;2738     if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000020  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000022  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
000026  b160              CBZ      r0,|L8.66|
;;;2739     {
;;;2740   #if !defined (USE_FULL_ASSERT)
;;;2741       /* Correspondence for compatibility with legacy definition of             */
;;;2742       /* sequencer ranks in direct number format. This correspondence can       */
;;;2743       /* be done only on ranks 1 to 5 due to literal values.                    */
;;;2744       /* Note: Sequencer ranks in direct number format are no more used         */
;;;2745       /*       and are detected by activating USE_FULL_ASSERT feature.          */
;;;2746       if (sConfig->Rank <= 5U)
;;;2747       {
;;;2748         switch (sConfig->Rank)
;;;2749         {
;;;2750           case 2U:
;;;2751             sConfig->Rank = ADC_REGULAR_RANK_2;
;;;2752             break;
;;;2753           case 3U:
;;;2754             sConfig->Rank = ADC_REGULAR_RANK_3;
;;;2755             break;
;;;2756           case 4U:
;;;2757             sConfig->Rank = ADC_REGULAR_RANK_4;
;;;2758             break;
;;;2759           case 5U:
;;;2760             sConfig->Rank = ADC_REGULAR_RANK_5;
;;;2761             break;
;;;2762           /* case 1U */
;;;2763           default:
;;;2764             sConfig->Rank = ADC_REGULAR_RANK_1;
;;;2765             break;
;;;2766         }
;;;2767       }
;;;2768   #endif
;;;2769   
;;;2770       /* Set ADC group regular sequence: channel on the selected scan sequence rank */
;;;2771       LL_ADC_REG_SetSequencerRanks(hadc->Instance, sConfig->Rank, sConfig->Channel);
;;;2772   
;;;2773       /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                              */
;;;2774       /* Parameters that can be updated when ADC is disabled or enabled without   */
;;;2775       /* conversion on going on regular group:                                    */
;;;2776       /*  - Channel sampling time                                                 */
;;;2777       /*  - Channel offset                                                        */
;;;2778       tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular = LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
;;;2779       tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected = LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
;;;2780       if ((tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular == 0UL)
;;;2781           && (tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected == 0UL)
;;;2782          )
;;;2783       {
;;;2784   #if defined(ADC_SMPR1_SMPPLUS)
;;;2785         /* Manage specific case of sampling time 3.5 cycles replacing 2.5 cyles */
;;;2786         if (sConfig->SamplingTime == ADC_SAMPLETIME_3CYCLES_5)
;;;2787         {
;;;2788           /* Set sampling time of the selected ADC channel */
;;;2789           LL_ADC_SetChannelSamplingTime(hadc->Instance, sConfig->Channel, LL_ADC_SAMPLINGTIME_2CYCLES_5);
;;;2790   
;;;2791           /* Set ADC sampling time common configuration */
;;;2792           LL_ADC_SetSamplingTimeCommonConfig(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_SAMPLINGTIME_COMMON_3C5_REPL_2C5);
;;;2793         }
;;;2794         else
;;;2795         {
;;;2796           /* Set sampling time of the selected ADC channel */
;;;2797           LL_ADC_SetChannelSamplingTime(hadc->Instance, sConfig->Channel, sConfig->SamplingTime);
;;;2798   
;;;2799           /* Set ADC sampling time common configuration */
;;;2800           LL_ADC_SetSamplingTimeCommonConfig(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_SAMPLINGTIME_COMMON_DEFAULT);
;;;2801         }
;;;2802   #else
;;;2803         /* Set sampling time of the selected ADC channel */
;;;2804         LL_ADC_SetChannelSamplingTime(hadc->Instance, sConfig->Channel, sConfig->SamplingTime);
;;;2805   #endif
;;;2806   
;;;2807         /* Configure the offset: offset enable/disable, channel, offset value */
;;;2808   
;;;2809         /* Shift the offset with respect to the selected ADC resolution. */
;;;2810         /* Offset has to be left-aligned on bit 11, the LSB (right bits) are set to 0 */
;;;2811         tmpOffsetShifted = ADC_OFFSET_SHIFT_RESOLUTION(hadc, (uint32_t)sConfig->Offset);
;;;2812   
;;;2813         if (sConfig->OffsetNumber != ADC_OFFSET_NONE)
;;;2814         {
;;;2815           /* Set ADC selected offset number */
;;;2816           LL_ADC_SetOffset(hadc->Instance, sConfig->OffsetNumber, sConfig->Channel, tmpOffsetShifted);
;;;2817   
;;;2818         }
;;;2819         else
;;;2820         {
;;;2821           /* Scan each offset register to check if the selected channel is targeted. */
;;;2822           /* If this is the case, the corresponding offset number is disabled.       */
;;;2823           if (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(LL_ADC_GetOffsetChannel(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_1))
;;;2824               == __LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(sConfig->Channel))
;;;2825           {
;;;2826             LL_ADC_SetOffsetState(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_1, LL_ADC_OFFSET_DISABLE);
;;;2827           }
;;;2828           if (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(LL_ADC_GetOffsetChannel(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_2))
;;;2829               == __LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(sConfig->Channel))
;;;2830           {
;;;2831             LL_ADC_SetOffsetState(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_2, LL_ADC_OFFSET_DISABLE);
;;;2832           }
;;;2833           if (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(LL_ADC_GetOffsetChannel(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_3))
;;;2834               == __LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(sConfig->Channel))
;;;2835           {
;;;2836             LL_ADC_SetOffsetState(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_3, LL_ADC_OFFSET_DISABLE);
;;;2837           }
;;;2838           if (__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(LL_ADC_GetOffsetChannel(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_4))
;;;2839               == __LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB(sConfig->Channel))
;;;2840           {
;;;2841             LL_ADC_SetOffsetState(hadc->Instance, LL_ADC_OFFSET_4, LL_ADC_OFFSET_DISABLE);
;;;2842           }
;;;2843         }
;;;2844       }
;;;2845   
;;;2846       /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                              */
;;;2847       /* Parameters that can be updated only when ADC is disabled:                */
;;;2848       /*  - Single or differential mode                                           */
;;;2849       if (LL_ADC_IsEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
;;;2850       {
;;;2851         /* Set mode single-ended or differential input of the selected ADC channel */
;;;2852         LL_ADC_SetChannelSingleDiff(hadc->Instance, sConfig->Channel, sConfig->SingleDiff);
;;;2853   
;;;2854         /* Configuration of differential mode */
;;;2855         if (sConfig->SingleDiff == ADC_DIFFERENTIAL_ENDED)
;;;2856         {
;;;2857           /* Set sampling time of the selected ADC channel */
;;;2858           /* Note: ADC channel number masked with value "0x1F" to ensure shift value within 32 bits range */
;;;2859           LL_ADC_SetChannelSamplingTime(hadc->Instance,
;;;2860                                         (uint32_t)(__LL_ADC_DECIMAL_NB_TO_CHANNEL((__LL_ADC_CHANNEL_TO_DECIMAL_NB((uint32_t)sConfig->Channel) + 1UL) & 0x1FUL)),
;;;2861                                         sConfig->SamplingTime);
;;;2862         }
;;;2863   
;;;2864       }
;;;2865   
;;;2866       /* Management of internal measurement channels: Vbat/VrefInt/TempSensor.  */
;;;2867       /* If internal channel selected, enable dedicated internal buffers and    */
;;;2868       /* paths.                                                                 */
;;;2869       /* Note: these internal measurement paths can be disabled using           */
;;;2870       /* HAL_ADC_DeInit().                                                      */
;;;2871   
;;;2872       if (__LL_ADC_IS_CHANNEL_INTERNAL(sConfig->Channel))
;;;2873       {
;;;2874         tmp_config_internal_channel = LL_ADC_GetCommonPathInternalCh(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2875   
;;;2876         /* If the requested internal measurement path has already been enabled, */
;;;2877         /* bypass the configuration processing.                                 */
;;;2878         if ((sConfig->Channel == ADC_CHANNEL_TEMPSENSOR)
;;;2879             && ((tmp_config_internal_channel & LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_TEMPSENSOR) == 0UL))
;;;2880         {
;;;2881           if (ADC_TEMPERATURE_SENSOR_INSTANCE(hadc))
;;;2882           {
;;;2883             LL_ADC_SetCommonPathInternalCh(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance),
;;;2884                                            LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_TEMPSENSOR | tmp_config_internal_channel);
;;;2885   
;;;2886             /* Delay for temperature sensor stabilization time */
;;;2887             /* Wait loop initialization and execution */
;;;2888             /* Note: Variable divided by 2 to compensate partially              */
;;;2889             /*       CPU processing cycles, scaling in us split to not          */
;;;2890             /*       exceed 32 bits register capacity and handle low frequency. */
;;;2891             wait_loop_index = ((LL_ADC_DELAY_TEMPSENSOR_STAB_US / 10UL) * ((SystemCoreClock / (100000UL * 2UL)) + 1UL));
;;;2892             while (wait_loop_index != 0UL)
;;;2893             {
;;;2894               wait_loop_index--;
;;;2895             }
;;;2896           }
;;;2897         }
;;;2898         else if ((sConfig->Channel == ADC_CHANNEL_VBAT) && ((tmp_config_internal_channel & LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_VBAT) == 0UL))
;;;2899         {
;;;2900           if (ADC_BATTERY_VOLTAGE_INSTANCE(hadc))
;;;2901           {
;;;2902             LL_ADC_SetCommonPathInternalCh(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance),
;;;2903                                            LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_VBAT | tmp_config_internal_channel);
;;;2904           }
;;;2905         }
;;;2906         else if ((sConfig->Channel == ADC_CHANNEL_VREFINT)
;;;2907                  && ((tmp_config_internal_channel & LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_VREFINT) == 0UL))
;;;2908         {
;;;2909           if (ADC_VREFINT_INSTANCE(hadc))
;;;2910           {
;;;2911             LL_ADC_SetCommonPathInternalCh(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance),
;;;2912                                            LL_ADC_PATH_INTERNAL_VREFINT | tmp_config_internal_channel);
;;;2913           }
;;;2914         }
;;;2915         else
;;;2916         {
;;;2917           /* nothing to do */
;;;2918         }
;;;2919       }
;;;2920     }
;;;2921   
;;;2922     /* If a conversion is on going on regular group, no update on regular       */
;;;2923     /* channel could be done on neither of the channel configuration structure  */
;;;2924     /* parameters.                                                              */
;;;2925     else
;;;2926     {
;;;2927       /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;2928       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_CONFIG);
000028  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00002a  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
00002e  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2929   
;;;2930       tmp_hal_status = HAL_ERROR;
000030  f05f0701          MOVS.W   r7,#1
                  |L8.52|
;;;2931     }
;;;2932   
;;;2933     /* Process unlocked */
;;;2934     __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
000034  f8848050          STRB     r8,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2935   
;;;2936     /* Return function status */
;;;2937     return tmp_hal_status;
000038  4638              MOV      r0,r7
                  |L8.58|
;;;2938   }
00003a  e8bd8ff8          POP      {r3-r11,pc}
                  |L8.62|

                  |L8.712|
0002c8  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;2860
0002ca  d00e              BEQ      |L8.746|
0002cc  fa90f1a0          RBIT     r1,r0                 ;2860
0002d0  fab1f181          CLZ      r1,r1                 ;2860
                  |L8.724|
0002d4  f1010101          ADD      r1,r1,#1              ;2860
0002d8  f001011f          AND      r1,r1,#0x1f           ;2860
0002dc  fa06f601          LSL      r6,r6,r1              ;2860
0002e0  d106              BNE      |L8.752|
0002e2  bf00              NOP                            ;2860
0002e4  f3c06184          UBFX     r1,r0,#26,#5          ;2860
0002e8  e006              B        |L8.760|
                  |L8.746|
0002ea  f3c06184          UBFX     r1,r0,#26,#5          ;2860
0002ee  e7f1              B        |L8.724|
                  |L8.752|
0002f0  fa90f1a0          RBIT     r1,r0                 ;2860
0002f4  fab1f181          CLZ      r1,r1                 ;2860
                  |L8.760|
0002f8  f1010101          ADD      r1,r1,#1              ;2860
0002fc  f001011f          AND      r1,r1,#0x1f           ;2860
000300  ea466181          ORR      r1,r6,r1,LSL #26      ;2860
000304  d102              BNE      |L8.780|
000306  f3c06084          UBFX     r0,r0,#26,#5          ;2860
00030a  e003              B        |L8.788|
                  |L8.780|
00030c  fa90f0a0          RBIT     r0,r0                 ;2860
000310  fab0f080          CLZ      r0,r0                 ;2860
                  |L8.788|
000314  f1000001          ADD      r0,r0,#1              ;2860
000318  f000001f          AND      r0,r0,#0x1f           ;2860
00031c  4a2b              LDR      r2,|L8.972|
00031e  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1       ;2860
000322  eb025000          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #20      ;2860
000326  ea410100          ORR      r1,r1,r0              ;2860
00032a  f0417100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x2000000      ;2860
                  |L8.814|
00032e  68aa              LDR      r2,[r5,#8]            ;2860
000330  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;2860
000332  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_SetChannelSamplingTime
                  |L8.822|
000336  4826              LDR      r0,|L8.976|
000338  682a              LDR      r2,[r5,#0]            ;2872
00033a  4202              TST      r2,r0                 ;2872
00033c  f43fae7a          BEQ      |L8.52|
000340  4824              LDR      r0,|L8.980|
000342  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;2872
000344  4d24              LDR      r5,|L8.984|
000346  4b25              LDR      r3,|L8.988|
000348  f00171e0          AND      r1,r1,#0x1c00000      ;2881
00034c  42aa              CMP      r2,r5                 ;2878
00034e  d11b              BNE      |L8.904|
000350  020d              LSLS     r5,r1,#8              ;2879
000352  d419              BMI      |L8.904|
000354  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]            ;2881
000356  429a              CMP      r2,r3                 ;2881
000358  f47fae6c          BNE      |L8.52|
00035c  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;2881
00035e  f4410100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x800000       ;2883
000362  f02272e0          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1c00000      ;2883
000366  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1              ;2883
000368  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;2883
00036a  481d              LDR      r0,|L8.992|
00036c  491d              LDR      r1,|L8.996|
00036e  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;2891  ; SystemCoreClock
000370  fbb0f0f1          UDIV     r0,r0,r1              ;2891
000374  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;2891
000376  eb000040          ADD      r0,r0,r0,LSL #1       ;2891
00037a  0080              LSLS     r0,r0,#2              ;2891
00037c  e000              B        |L8.896|
                  |L8.894|
00037e  1e40              SUBS     r0,r0,#1              ;2892
                  |L8.896|
000380  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;2891
000382  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;2891
000384  d1fb              BNE      |L8.894|
                  |L8.902|
000386  e655              B        |L8.52|
                  |L8.904|
000388  4d17              LDR      r5,|L8.1000|
00038a  42aa              CMP      r2,r5                 ;2898
00038c  d107              BNE      |L8.926|
00038e  01cd              LSLS     r5,r1,#7              ;2898
000390  d405              BMI      |L8.926|
000392  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]            ;2900
000394  429a              CMP      r2,r3                 ;2900
000396  d1f6              BNE      |L8.902|
000398  f0417180          ORR      r1,r1,#0x1000000      ;2902
00039c  e00a              B        |L8.948|
                  |L8.926|
00039e  f06f4500          MVN      r5,#0x80000000        ;2906
0003a2  42ea              CMN      r2,r5                 ;2906
0003a4  d1ef              BNE      |L8.902|
0003a6  024a              LSLS     r2,r1,#9              ;2907
0003a8  d4ed              BMI      |L8.902|
0003aa  6822              LDR      r2,[r4,#0]            ;2909
0003ac  429a              CMP      r2,r3                 ;2909
0003ae  d1ea              BNE      |L8.902|
0003b0  f4410180          ORR      r1,r1,#0x400000       ;2911
                  |L8.948|
0003b4  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;2911
0003b6  f02272e0          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1c00000      ;2911
0003ba  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1              ;2911
0003bc  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;2911
0003be  e639              B        |L8.52|
;;;2939   
                          ENDP

                  |L8.960|
                          DCD      0x407f0000
                  |L8.964|
                          DCD      0x03fff000
                  |L8.968|
                          DCD      0x0007ffff
                  |L8.972|
                          DCD      0xfe200000
                  |L8.976|

                  |L8.980|

                  |L8.984|

                  |L8.988|
