                  |L8.992|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L8.996|
                          DCD      0x00030d40
                  |L8.1000|
                          DCD      0xcb840000

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback PROC
;;;2600     */
;;;2601   __weak void HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;2602   {
;;;2603     /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;2604     UNUSED(hadc);
;;;2605   
;;;2606     /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;2607               function HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback must be implemented in the user file.
;;;2608      */
;;;2609   }
;;;2610   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_ConvHalfCpltCallback||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_ConvHalfCpltCallback PROC
;;;2615     */
;;;2616   __weak void HAL_ADC_ConvHalfCpltCallback(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;2617   {
;;;2618     /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;2619     UNUSED(hadc);
;;;2620   
;;;2621     /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;2622               function HAL_ADC_ConvHalfCpltCallback must be implemented in the user file.
;;;2623     */
;;;2624   }
;;;2625   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_DeInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_DeInit PROC
;;;697      */
;;;698    HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_DeInit(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;699    {
000002  0004              MOVS     r4,r0
000004  d00f              BEQ      |L11.38|
;;;700      HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;701    
;;;702      /* Check ADC handle */
;;;703      if (hadc == NULL)
;;;704      {
;;;705        return HAL_ERROR;
;;;706      }
;;;707    
;;;708      /* Check the parameters */
;;;709      assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;710    
;;;711      /* Set ADC state */
;;;712      SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_BUSY_INTERNAL);
000006  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000008  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
00000c  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;713    
;;;714      /* Stop potential conversion on going */
;;;715      tmp_hal_status = ADC_ConversionStop(hadc, ADC_REGULAR_INJECTED_GROUP);
00000e  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000010  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000012  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_ConversionStop
000016  0005              MOVS     r5,r0
;;;716    
;;;717      /* Disable ADC peripheral if conversions are effectively stopped            */
;;;718      /* Flush register JSQR: reset the queue sequencer when injected             */
;;;719      /* queue sequencer is enabled and ADC disabled.                             */
;;;720      /* The software and hardware triggers of the injected sequence are both     */
;;;721      /* internally disabled just after the completion of the last valid          */
;;;722      /* injected sequence.                                                       */
;;;723      SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JQM);
000018  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00001a  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]
00001c  f4411100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x200000
000020  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]
;;;724    
;;;725      /* Disable ADC peripheral if conversions are effectively stopped */
;;;726      if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
000022  d002              BEQ      |L11.42|
000024  e008              B        |L11.56|
                  |L11.38|
000026  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;705
;;;727      {
;;;728        /* Disable the ADC peripheral */
;;;729        tmp_hal_status = ADC_Disable(hadc);
;;;730    
;;;731        /* Check if ADC is effectively disabled */
;;;732        if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;733        {
;;;734          /* Change ADC state */
;;;735          hadc->State = HAL_ADC_STATE_READY;
;;;736        }
;;;737      }
;;;738    
;;;739      /* Note: HAL ADC deInit is done independently of ADC conversion stop        */
;;;740      /*       and disable return status. In case of status fail, attempt to      */
;;;741      /*       perform deinitialization anyway and it is up user code in          */
;;;742      /*       in HAL_ADC_MspDeInit() to reset the ADC peripheral using           */
;;;743      /*       system RCC hard reset.                                             */
;;;744    
;;;745      /* ========== Reset ADC registers ========== */
;;;746      /* Reset register IER */
;;;747      __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, (ADC_IT_AWD3  | ADC_IT_AWD2 | ADC_IT_AWD1 |
;;;748                                  ADC_IT_JQOVF | ADC_IT_OVR  |
;;;749                                  ADC_IT_JEOS  | ADC_IT_JEOC |
;;;750                                  ADC_IT_EOS   | ADC_IT_EOC  |
;;;751                                  ADC_IT_EOSMP | ADC_IT_RDY));
;;;752    
;;;753      /* Reset register ISR */
;;;754      __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_AWD3  | ADC_FLAG_AWD2 | ADC_FLAG_AWD1 |
;;;755                                  ADC_FLAG_JQOVF | ADC_FLAG_OVR  |
;;;756                                  ADC_FLAG_JEOS  | ADC_FLAG_JEOC |
;;;757                                  ADC_FLAG_EOS   | ADC_FLAG_EOC  |
;;;758                                  ADC_FLAG_EOSMP | ADC_FLAG_RDY));
;;;759    
;;;760      /* Reset register CR */
;;;761      /* Bits ADC_CR_JADSTP, ADC_CR_ADSTP, ADC_CR_JADSTART, ADC_CR_ADSTART,
;;;762         ADC_CR_ADCAL, ADC_CR_ADDIS and ADC_CR_ADEN are in access mode "read-set":
;;;763         no direct reset applicable.
;;;764         Update CR register to reset value where doable by software */
;;;765      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CR, ADC_CR_ADVREGEN | ADC_CR_ADCALDIF);
;;;766      SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->CR, ADC_CR_DEEPPWD);
;;;767    
;;;768      /* Reset register CFGR */
;;;769      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_FIELDS);
;;;770      SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JQDIS);
;;;771    
;;;772      /* Reset register CFGR2 */
;;;773      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR2, ADC_CFGR2_ROVSM  | ADC_CFGR2_TROVS   | ADC_CFGR2_OVSS |
;;;774                ADC_CFGR2_OVSR  | ADC_CFGR2_JOVSE | ADC_CFGR2_ROVSE);
;;;775    
;;;776      /* Reset register SMPR1 */
;;;777      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SMPR1, ADC_SMPR1_FIELDS);
;;;778    
;;;779      /* Reset register SMPR2 */
;;;780      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SMPR2, ADC_SMPR2_SMP18 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP17 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP16 |
;;;781                ADC_SMPR2_SMP15 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP14 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP13 |
;;;782                ADC_SMPR2_SMP12 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP11 | ADC_SMPR2_SMP10);
;;;783    
;;;784      /* Reset register TR1 */
;;;785      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->TR1, ADC_TR1_HT1 | ADC_TR1_LT1);
;;;786    
;;;787      /* Reset register TR2 */
;;;788      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->TR2, ADC_TR2_HT2 | ADC_TR2_LT2);
;;;789    
;;;790      /* Reset register TR3 */
;;;791      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->TR3, ADC_TR3_HT3 | ADC_TR3_LT3);
;;;792    
;;;793      /* Reset register SQR1 */
;;;794      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SQR1, ADC_SQR1_SQ4 | ADC_SQR1_SQ3 | ADC_SQR1_SQ2 |
;;;795                ADC_SQR1_SQ1 | ADC_SQR1_L);
;;;796    
;;;797      /* Reset register SQR2 */
;;;798      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SQR2, ADC_SQR2_SQ9 | ADC_SQR2_SQ8 | ADC_SQR2_SQ7 |
;;;799                ADC_SQR2_SQ6 | ADC_SQR2_SQ5);
;;;800    
;;;801      /* Reset register SQR3 */
;;;802      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SQR3, ADC_SQR3_SQ14 | ADC_SQR3_SQ13 | ADC_SQR3_SQ12 |
;;;803                ADC_SQR3_SQ11 | ADC_SQR3_SQ10);
;;;804    
;;;805      /* Reset register SQR4 */
;;;806      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SQR4, ADC_SQR4_SQ16 | ADC_SQR4_SQ15);
;;;807    
;;;808      /* Register JSQR was reset when the ADC was disabled */
;;;809    
;;;810      /* Reset register DR */
;;;811      /* bits in access mode read only, no direct reset applicable*/
;;;812    
;;;813      /* Reset register OFR1 */
;;;814      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->OFR1, ADC_OFR1_OFFSET1_EN | ADC_OFR1_OFFSET1_CH | ADC_OFR1_OFFSET1);
;;;815      /* Reset register OFR2 */
;;;816      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->OFR2, ADC_OFR2_OFFSET2_EN | ADC_OFR2_OFFSET2_CH | ADC_OFR2_OFFSET2);
;;;817      /* Reset register OFR3 */
;;;818      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->OFR3, ADC_OFR3_OFFSET3_EN | ADC_OFR3_OFFSET3_CH | ADC_OFR3_OFFSET3);
;;;819      /* Reset register OFR4 */
;;;820      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->OFR4, ADC_OFR4_OFFSET4_EN | ADC_OFR4_OFFSET4_CH | ADC_OFR4_OFFSET4);
;;;821    
;;;822      /* Reset registers JDR1, JDR2, JDR3, JDR4 */
;;;823      /* bits in access mode read only, no direct reset applicable*/
;;;824    
;;;825      /* Reset register AWD2CR */
;;;826      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->AWD2CR, ADC_AWD2CR_AWD2CH);
;;;827    
;;;828      /* Reset register AWD3CR */
;;;829      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->AWD3CR, ADC_AWD3CR_AWD3CH);
;;;830    
;;;831      /* Reset register DIFSEL */
;;;832      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->DIFSEL, ADC_DIFSEL_DIFSEL);
;;;833    
;;;834      /* Reset register CALFACT */
;;;835      CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CALFACT, ADC_CALFACT_CALFACT_D | ADC_CALFACT_CALFACT_S);
;;;836    
;;;837    
;;;838      /* ========== Reset common ADC registers ========== */
;;;839    
;;;840      /* Software is allowed to change common parameters only when all the other
;;;841         ADCs are disabled.   */
;;;842      if (__LL_ADC_IS_ENABLED_ALL_COMMON_INSTANCE(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance)) == 0UL)
;;;843      {
;;;844        /* Reset configuration of ADC common register CCR:
;;;845          - clock mode: CKMODE, PRESCEN
;;;846          - multimode related parameters (when this feature is available): MDMA,
;;;847            DMACFG, DELAY, DUAL (set by HAL_ADCEx_MultiModeConfigChannel() API)
;;;848          - internal measurement paths: Vbat, temperature sensor, Vref (set into
;;;849            HAL_ADC_ConfigChannel() or HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConfigChannel() )
;;;850        */
;;;851        ADC_CLEAR_COMMON_CONTROL_REGISTER(hadc);
;;;852    
;;;853        /* ========== Hard reset ADC peripheral ========== */
;;;854        /* Performs a global reset of the entire ADC peripherals instances        */
;;;855        /* sharing the same common ADC instance: ADC state is forced to           */
;;;856        /* a similar state as after device power-on.                              */
;;;857        /* Note: A possible implementation is to add RCC bus reset of ADC         */
;;;858        /* (for example, using macro                                              */
;;;859        /*  __HAL_RCC_ADC..._FORCE_RESET()/..._RELEASE_RESET()/..._CLK_DISABLE()) */
;;;860        /* in function "void HAL_ADC_MspDeInit(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)":         */
;;;861    #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;862        if (hadc->MspDeInitCallback == NULL)
;;;863        {
;;;864          hadc->MspDeInitCallback = HAL_ADC_MspDeInit; /* Legacy weak MspDeInit  */
;;;865        }
;;;866    
;;;867        /* DeInit the low level hardware */
;;;868        hadc->MspDeInitCallback(hadc);
;;;869    #else
;;;870        /* DeInit the low level hardware */
;;;871        HAL_ADC_MspDeInit(hadc);
;;;872    #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;873      }
;;;874    
;;;875      /* Set ADC error code to none */
;;;876      ADC_CLEAR_ERRORCODE(hadc);
;;;877    
;;;878      /* Reset injected channel configuration parameters */
;;;879      hadc->InjectionConfig.ContextQueue = 0;
;;;880      hadc->InjectionConfig.ChannelCount = 0;
;;;881    
;;;882      /* Set ADC state */
;;;883      hadc->State = HAL_ADC_STATE_RESET;
;;;884    
;;;885      /* Process unlocked */
;;;886      __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;887    
;;;888      /* Return function status */
;;;889      return tmp_hal_status;
;;;890    }
000028  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L11.42|
00002a  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;729
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Disable
000030  0005              MOVS     r5,r0                 ;729
000032  d101              BNE      |L11.56|
000034  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;735
000036  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;735
                  |L11.56|
000038  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;747
00003a  6841              LDR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;747
00003c  f36f010a          BFC      r1,#0,#11             ;747
000040  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;747
000042  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;754
000044  f24070ff          MOV      r0,#0x7ff             ;754
000048  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]            ;754
00004a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;765
00004c  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;765
00004e  f02141a0          BIC      r1,r1,#0x50000000     ;765
000052  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;765
000054  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;766
000056  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;766
000058  f0415100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x20000000     ;766
00005c  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;766
00005e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;769
000060  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;769
000062  4a3d              LDR      r2,|L11.344|
000064  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2              ;769
000066  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;769
000068  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;770
00006a  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;770
00006c  f0414100          ORR      r1,r1,#0x80000000     ;770
000070  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;770
000072  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;773
000074  6901              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x10]         ;773
000076  f36f010a          BFC      r1,#0,#11             ;773
00007a  6101              STR      r1,[r0,#0x10]         ;773
00007c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;777
00007e  6941              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x14]         ;777
000080  f0014140          AND      r1,r1,#0xc0000000     ;777
000084  6141              STR      r1,[r0,#0x14]         ;777
000086  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;780
000088  6981              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x18]         ;780
00008a  f0014178          AND      r1,r1,#0xf8000000     ;780
00008e  6181              STR      r1,[r0,#0x18]         ;780
000090  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;785
000092  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]         ;785
000094  f00121f0          AND      r1,r1,#0xf000f000     ;785
000098  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]         ;785
00009a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;788
00009c  6a41              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x24]         ;788
00009e  f00121ff          AND      r1,r1,#0xff00ff00     ;788
0000a2  6241              STR      r1,[r0,#0x24]         ;788
0000a4  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;791
0000a6  6a81              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x28]         ;791
0000a8  f00121ff          AND      r1,r1,#0xff00ff00     ;791
0000ac  6281              STR      r1,[r0,#0x28]         ;791
0000ae  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;794
0000b0  6b01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x30]         ;794
0000b2  4a2a              LDR      r2,|L11.348|
0000b4  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2              ;794
0000b6  6301              STR      r1,[r0,#0x30]         ;794
0000b8  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;798
0000ba  6b42              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x34]         ;798
0000bc  4927              LDR      r1,|L11.348|
0000be  3910              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x10           ;798
0000c0  400a              ANDS     r2,r2,r1              ;798
0000c2  6342              STR      r2,[r0,#0x34]         ;798
0000c4  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;802
0000c6  6b82              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x38]         ;802
0000c8  400a              ANDS     r2,r2,r1              ;802
0000ca  6382              STR      r2,[r0,#0x38]         ;802
0000cc  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;806
0000ce  6bc1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]         ;806
0000d0  f24072df          MOV      r2,#0x7df             ;806
0000d4  4391              BICS     r1,r1,r2              ;806
0000d6  63c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0x3c]         ;806
0000d8  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;814
0000da  6e0a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x60]         ;814
0000dc  4820              LDR      r0,|L11.352|
0000de  4002              ANDS     r2,r2,r0              ;814
0000e0  660a              STR      r2,[r1,#0x60]         ;814
0000e2  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;816
0000e4  6e4a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x64]         ;816
0000e6  4002              ANDS     r2,r2,r0              ;816
0000e8  664a              STR      r2,[r1,#0x64]         ;816
0000ea  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;818
0000ec  6e8a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x68]         ;818
0000ee  4002              ANDS     r2,r2,r0              ;818
0000f0  668a              STR      r2,[r1,#0x68]         ;818
0000f2  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;820
0000f4  6eca              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x6c]         ;820
0000f6  4002              ANDS     r2,r2,r0              ;820
0000f8  66ca              STR      r2,[r1,#0x6c]         ;820
0000fa  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;826
0000fc  f8501fa0          LDR      r1,[r0,#0xa0]!        ;826
000100  f36f0112          BFC      r1,#0,#19             ;826
000104  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;826
000106  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;829
000108  f8501fa4          LDR      r1,[r0,#0xa4]!        ;829
00010c  f36f0112          BFC      r1,#0,#19             ;829
000110  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;829
000112  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;832
000114  f8501fb0          LDR      r1,[r0,#0xb0]!        ;832
000118  f36f0112          BFC      r1,#0,#19             ;832
00011c  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;832
00011e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;835
000120  f8501fb4          LDR      r1,[r0,#0xb4]!        ;835
000124  f021117f          BIC      r1,r1,#0x7f007f       ;835
000128  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;835
00012a  480e              LDR      r0,|L11.356|
00012c  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;835
00012e  f0110f01          TST      r1,#1                 ;835
000132  d108              BNE      |L11.326|
000134  f8d01308          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x308]        ;851
000138  4a0b              LDR      r2,|L11.360|
00013a  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2              ;851
00013c  f8c01308          STR      r1,[r0,#0x308]        ;851
000140  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;871
000142  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_MspDeInit
                  |L11.326|
000146  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;876
000148  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]         ;876
00014a  65e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x5c]         ;880
00014c  6620              STR      r0,[r4,#0x60]         ;883
00014e  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;883
000150  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;886
000154  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;889
000156  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;891    
                          ENDP

                  |L11.344|
                          DCD      0x80008004
                  |L11.348|
                          DCD      0xe0820830
                  |L11.352|
                          DCD      0x03fff000
                  |L11.356|
                          DCD      0x50040000
                  |L11.360|
                          DCD      0xfe00ffff

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback PROC
;;;2652     */
;;;2653   __weak void HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;2654   {
;;;2655     /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;2656     UNUSED(hadc);
;;;2657   
;;;2658     /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;2659               function HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback must be implemented in the user file.
;;;2660     */
;;;2661   }
;;;2662   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_GetError||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_GetError PROC
;;;3223     */
;;;3224   uint32_t HAL_ADC_GetError(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  6d80              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x58]
;;;3225   {
;;;3226     /* Check the parameters */
;;;3227     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;3228   
;;;3229     return hadc->ErrorCode;
;;;3230   }
000002  4770              BX       lr
;;;3231   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_GetState||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_GetState PROC
;;;3209     */
;;;3210   uint32_t HAL_ADC_GetState(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  6d40              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x54]
;;;3211   {
;;;3212     /* Check the parameters */
;;;3213     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;3214   
;;;3215     /* Return ADC handle state */
;;;3216     return hadc->State;
;;;3217   }
000002  4770              BX       lr
;;;3218   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_GetValue||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_GetValue PROC
;;;2211     */
;;;2212   uint32_t HAL_ADC_GetValue(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
;;;2213   {
;;;2214     /* Check the parameters */
;;;2215     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2216   
;;;2217     /* Note: EOC flag is not cleared here by software because automatically     */
;;;2218     /*       cleared by hardware when reading register DR.                      */
;;;2219   
;;;2220     /* Return ADC converted value */
;;;2221     return hadc->Instance->DR;
000002  6c00              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x40]
;;;2222   }
000004  4770              BX       lr
;;;2223   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_IRQHandler||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_IRQHandler PROC
;;;2228     */
;;;2229   void HAL_ADC_IRQHandler(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;2230   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;2231     uint32_t overrun_error = 0UL; /* flag set if overrun occurrence has to be considered as an error */
;;;2232     uint32_t tmp_isr = hadc->Instance->ISR;
000006  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000008  6806              LDR      r6,[r0,#0]
;;;2233     uint32_t tmp_ier = hadc->Instance->IER;
00000a  6845              LDR      r5,[r0,#4]
;;;2234     uint32_t tmp_adc_inj_is_trigger_source_sw_start;
;;;2235     uint32_t tmp_adc_reg_is_trigger_source_sw_start;
;;;2236     uint32_t tmp_cfgr;
;;;2237   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2238     const ADC_TypeDef *tmpADC_Master;
;;;2239     uint32_t tmp_multimode_config = LL_ADC_GetMultimode(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2240   #endif
;;;2241   
;;;2242     /* Check the parameters */
;;;2243     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2244     assert_param(IS_ADC_EOC_SELECTION(hadc->Init.EOCSelection));
;;;2245   
;;;2246     /* ========== Check End of Sampling flag for ADC group regular ========== */
;;;2247     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_EOSMP) == ADC_FLAG_EOSMP) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_EOSMP) == ADC_IT_EOSMP))
00000c  07b0              LSLS     r0,r6,#30
00000e  d50e              BPL      |L16.46|
000010  07a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#30
000012  d50c              BPL      |L16.46|
;;;2248     {
;;;2249       /* Update state machine on end of sampling status if not in error state */
;;;2250       if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL) == 0UL)
000014  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000016  06c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#27
000018  d403              BMI      |L16.34|
;;;2251       {
;;;2252         /* Set ADC state */
;;;2253         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOSMP);
00001a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00001c  f4406000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x800
000020  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
                  |L16.34|
;;;2254       }
;;;2255   
;;;2256       /* End Of Sampling callback */
;;;2257   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2258       hadc->EndOfSamplingCallback(hadc);
;;;2259   #else
;;;2260       HAL_ADCEx_EndOfSamplingCallback(hadc);
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADCEx_EndOfSamplingCallback
;;;2261   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2262   
;;;2263       /* Clear regular group conversion flag */
;;;2264       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOSMP);
000028  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00002a  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
00002c  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.46|
;;;2265     }
;;;2266   
;;;2267     /* ====== Check ADC group regular end of unitary conversion sequence conversions ===== */
;;;2268     if ((((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_EOC) == ADC_FLAG_EOC) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_EOC) == ADC_IT_EOC)) ||
00002e  0770              LSLS     r0,r6,#29
000030  d501              BPL      |L16.54|
000032  0768              LSLS     r0,r5,#29
000034  d403              BMI      |L16.62|
                  |L16.54|
;;;2269         (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_EOS) == ADC_FLAG_EOS) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_EOS) == ADC_IT_EOS)))
000036  0730              LSLS     r0,r6,#28
000038  d525              BPL      |L16.134|
00003a  0728              LSLS     r0,r5,#28
00003c  d523              BPL      |L16.134|
                  |L16.62|
;;;2270     {
;;;2271       /* Update state machine on conversion status if not in error state */
;;;2272       if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL) == 0UL)
00003e  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000040  06c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#27
000042  d403              BMI      |L16.76|
;;;2273       {
;;;2274         /* Set ADC state */
;;;2275         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC);
000044  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000046  f4407000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x200
00004a  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
                  |L16.76|
;;;2276       }
;;;2277   
;;;2278       /* Determine whether any further conversion upcoming on group regular     */
;;;2279       /* by external trigger, continuous mode or scan sequence on going         */
;;;2280       /* to disable interruption.                                               */
;;;2281       if (LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
00004c  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00004e  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart
000052  b190              CBZ      r0,|L16.122|
;;;2282       {
;;;2283         /* Get relevant register CFGR in ADC instance of ADC master or slave    */
;;;2284         /* in function of multimode state (for devices with multimode           */
;;;2285         /* available).                                                          */
;;;2286   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2287         if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;2288             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;2289             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;2290             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;2291            )
;;;2292         {
;;;2293           /* check CONT bit directly in handle ADC CFGR register */
;;;2294           tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
;;;2295         }
;;;2296         else
;;;2297         {
;;;2298           /* else need to check Master ADC CONT bit */
;;;2299           tmpADC_Master = __LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance);
;;;2300           tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(tmpADC_Master->CFGR);
;;;2301         }
;;;2302   #else
;;;2303         tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
000054  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000056  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]
;;;2304   #endif
;;;2305   
;;;2306         /* Carry on if continuous mode is disabled */
;;;2307         if (READ_BIT(tmp_cfgr, ADC_CFGR_CONT) != ADC_CFGR_CONT)
000058  0489              LSLS     r1,r1,#18
00005a  d40e              BMI      |L16.122|
;;;2308         {
;;;2309           /* If End of Sequence is reached, disable interrupts */
;;;2310           if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOS))
00005c  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
00005e  0709              LSLS     r1,r1,#28
000060  d50b              BPL      |L16.122|
;;;2311           {
;;;2312             /* Allowed to modify bits ADC_IT_EOC/ADC_IT_EOS only if bit         */
;;;2313             /* ADSTART==0 (no conversion on going)                              */
;;;2314             if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000062  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000068  d07d              BEQ      |L16.358|
;;;2315             {
;;;2316               /* Disable ADC end of sequence conversion interrupt */
;;;2317               /* Note: Overrun interrupt was enabled with EOC interrupt in      */
;;;2318               /* HAL_Start_IT(), but is not disabled here because can be used   */
;;;2319               /* by overrun IRQ process below.                                  */
;;;2320               __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_EOC | ADC_IT_EOS);
;;;2321   
;;;2322               /* Set ADC state */
;;;2323               CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;2324   
;;;2325               if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) == 0UL)
;;;2326               {
;;;2327                 SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;2328               }
;;;2329             }
;;;2330             else
;;;2331             {
;;;2332               /* Change ADC state to error state */
;;;2333               SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
00006a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00006c  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
000070  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2334   
;;;2335               /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;2336               SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
000072  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
000074  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
000078  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
                  |L16.122|
;;;2337             }
;;;2338           }
;;;2339         }
;;;2340       }
;;;2341   
;;;2342       /* Conversion complete callback */
;;;2343       /* Note: Into callback function "HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback()",             */
;;;2344       /*       to determine if conversion has been triggered from EOC or EOS,   */
;;;2345       /*       possibility to use:                                              */
;;;2346       /*        " if ( __HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(&hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOS)) "               */
;;;2347   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2348       hadc->ConvCpltCallback(hadc);
;;;2349   #else
;;;2350       HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback(hadc);
00007a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00007c  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback
;;;2351   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2352   
;;;2353       /* Clear regular group conversion flag */
;;;2354       /* Note: in case of overrun set to ADC_OVR_DATA_PRESERVED, end of         */
;;;2355       /*       conversion flags clear induces the release of the preserved data.*/
;;;2356       /*       Therefore, if the preserved data value is needed, it must be     */
;;;2357       /*       read preliminarily into HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback().              */
;;;2358       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOC | ADC_FLAG_EOS));
000080  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
000082  200c              MOVS     r0,#0xc
000084  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.134|
;;;2359     }
;;;2360   
;;;2361     /* ====== Check ADC group injected end of unitary conversion sequence conversions ===== */
;;;2362     if ((((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_JEOC) == ADC_FLAG_JEOC) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_JEOC) == ADC_IT_JEOC)) ||
000086  06b0              LSLS     r0,r6,#26
000088  d501              BPL      |L16.142|
00008a  06a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#26
00008c  d403              BMI      |L16.150|
                  |L16.142|
;;;2363         (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_JEOS) == ADC_FLAG_JEOS) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_JEOS) == ADC_IT_JEOS)))
00008e  0670              LSLS     r0,r6,#25
000090  d531              BPL      |L16.246|
000092  0668              LSLS     r0,r5,#25
000094  d52f              BPL      |L16.246|
                  |L16.150|
;;;2364     {
;;;2365       /* Update state machine on conversion status if not in error state */
;;;2366       if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL) == 0UL)
000096  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000098  06c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#27
00009a  d403              BMI      |L16.164|
;;;2367       {
;;;2368         /* Set ADC state */
;;;2369         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC);
00009c  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00009e  f4405000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x2000
0000a2  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
                  |L16.164|
0000a4  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
0000a6  6cc1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x4c]
0000a8  f0110fc0          TST      r1,#0xc0
0000ac  d07d              BEQ      |L16.426|
0000ae  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
                  |L16.176|
;;;2370       }
;;;2371   
;;;2372       /* Retrieve ADC configuration */
;;;2373       tmp_adc_inj_is_trigger_source_sw_start = LL_ADC_INJ_IsTriggerSourceSWStart(hadc->Instance);
;;;2374       tmp_adc_reg_is_trigger_source_sw_start = LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart(hadc->Instance);
0000b0  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart
;;;2375       /* Get relevant register CFGR in ADC instance of ADC master or slave  */
;;;2376       /* in function of multimode state (for devices with multimode         */
;;;2377       /* available).                                                        */
;;;2378   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2379       if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;2380           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;2381           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_REG_SIMULT)
;;;2382           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_REG_INTERL)
;;;2383          )
;;;2384       {
;;;2385         tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
;;;2386       }
;;;2387       else
;;;2388       {
;;;2389         tmpADC_Master = __LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance);
;;;2390         tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(tmpADC_Master->CFGR);
;;;2391       }
;;;2392   #else
;;;2393       tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
0000b4  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
0000b6  4602              MOV      r2,r0                 ;2374
0000b8  68c8              LDR      r0,[r1,#0xc]
;;;2394   #endif
;;;2395   
;;;2396       /* Disable interruption if no further conversion upcoming by injected     */
;;;2397       /* external trigger or by automatic injected conversion with regular      */
;;;2398       /* group having no further conversion upcoming (same conditions as        */
;;;2399       /* regular group interruption disabling above),                           */
;;;2400       /* and if injected scan sequence is completed.                            */
;;;2401       if (tmp_adc_inj_is_trigger_source_sw_start != 0UL)
0000ba  b1b7              CBZ      r7,|L16.234|
;;;2402       {
;;;2403         if ((READ_BIT(tmp_cfgr, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) == 0UL) ||
0000bc  0183              LSLS     r3,r0,#6
0000be  d502              BPL      |L16.198|
;;;2404             ((tmp_adc_reg_is_trigger_source_sw_start != 0UL) &&
0000c0  b19a              CBZ      r2,|L16.234|
;;;2405              (READ_BIT(tmp_cfgr, ADC_CFGR_CONT) == 0UL)))
0000c2  0482              LSLS     r2,r0,#18
0000c4  d411              BMI      |L16.234|
                  |L16.198|
;;;2406         {
;;;2407           /* If End of Sequence is reached, disable interrupts */
;;;2408           if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOS))
0000c6  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
0000c8  0652              LSLS     r2,r2,#25
0000ca  d50e              BPL      |L16.234|
;;;2409           {
;;;2410             /* Particular case if injected contexts queue is enabled:             */
;;;2411             /* when the last context has been fully processed, JSQR is reset      */
;;;2412             /* by the hardware. Even if no injected conversion is planned to come */
;;;2413             /* (queue empty, triggers are ignored), it can start again            */
;;;2414             /* immediately after setting a new context (JADSTART is still set).   */
;;;2415             /* Therefore, state of HAL ADC injected group is kept to busy.        */
;;;2416             if (READ_BIT(tmp_cfgr, ADC_CFGR_JQM) == 0UL)
0000cc  0280              LSLS     r0,r0,#10
0000ce  d40c              BMI      |L16.234|
0000d0  4608              MOV      r0,r1
;;;2417             {
;;;2418               /* Allowed to modify bits ADC_IT_JEOC/ADC_IT_JEOS only if bit       */
;;;2419               /* JADSTART==0 (no conversion on going)                             */
;;;2420               if (LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
0000d2  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing
0000d6  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000d8  d07f              BEQ      |L16.474|
;;;2421               {
;;;2422                 /* Disable ADC end of sequence conversion interrupt  */
;;;2423                 __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC | ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;2424   
;;;2425                 /* Set ADC state */
;;;2426                 CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;2427   
;;;2428                 if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY) == 0UL)
;;;2429                 {
;;;2430                   SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;2431                 }
;;;2432               }
;;;2433               else
;;;2434               {
;;;2435                 /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;2436                 SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
0000da  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
0000dc  f0400010          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10
0000e0  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2437   
;;;2438                 /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;2439                 SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
0000e2  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
0000e4  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1
0000e8  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
                  |L16.234|
;;;2440               }
;;;2441             }
;;;2442           }
;;;2443         }
;;;2444       }
;;;2445   
;;;2446       /* Injected Conversion complete callback */
;;;2447       /* Note:  HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConvCpltCallback can resort to
;;;2448                 if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(&hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOS)) or
;;;2449                 if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(&hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOC)) to determine whether
;;;2450                 interruption has been triggered by end of conversion or end of
;;;2451                 sequence.    */
;;;2452   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2453       hadc->InjectedConvCpltCallback(hadc);
;;;2454   #else
;;;2455       HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConvCpltCallback(hadc);
0000ea  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0000ec  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConvCpltCallback
;;;2456   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2457   
;;;2458       /* Clear injected group conversion flag */
;;;2459       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JEOC | ADC_FLAG_JEOS);
0000f0  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
0000f2  2060              MOVS     r0,#0x60
0000f4  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.246|
;;;2460     }
;;;2461   
;;;2462     /* ========== Check Analog watchdog 1 flag ========== */
;;;2463     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_AWD1) == ADC_FLAG_AWD1) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_AWD1) == ADC_IT_AWD1))
0000f6  0630              LSLS     r0,r6,#24
0000f8  d50b              BPL      |L16.274|
0000fa  0628              LSLS     r0,r5,#24
0000fc  d509              BPL      |L16.274|
;;;2464     {
;;;2465       /* Set ADC state */
;;;2466       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD1);
0000fe  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000100  f4403080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10000
000104  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2467   
;;;2468       /* Level out of window 1 callback */
;;;2469   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2470       hadc->LevelOutOfWindowCallback(hadc);
;;;2471   #else
;;;2472       HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback(hadc);
000106  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000108  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback
;;;2473   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2474   
;;;2475       /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;2476       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD1);
00010c  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00010e  2080              MOVS     r0,#0x80
000110  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.274|
;;;2477     }
;;;2478   
;;;2479     /* ========== Check analog watchdog 2 flag ========== */
;;;2480     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_AWD2) == ADC_FLAG_AWD2) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_AWD2) == ADC_IT_AWD2))
000112  05f0              LSLS     r0,r6,#23
000114  d50c              BPL      |L16.304|
000116  05e8              LSLS     r0,r5,#23
000118  d50a              BPL      |L16.304|
;;;2481     {
;;;2482       /* Set ADC state */
;;;2483       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD2);
00011a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00011c  f4403000          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20000
000120  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2484   
;;;2485       /* Level out of window 2 callback */
;;;2486   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2487       hadc->LevelOutOfWindow2Callback(hadc);
;;;2488   #else
;;;2489       HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow2Callback(hadc);
000122  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000124  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow2Callback
;;;2490   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2491   
;;;2492       /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;2493       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD2);
000128  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00012a  f44f7080          MOV      r0,#0x100
00012e  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.304|
;;;2494     }
;;;2495   
;;;2496     /* ========== Check analog watchdog 3 flag ========== */
;;;2497     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_AWD3) == ADC_FLAG_AWD3) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_AWD3) == ADC_IT_AWD3))
000130  05b0              LSLS     r0,r6,#22
000132  d50c              BPL      |L16.334|
000134  05a8              LSLS     r0,r5,#22
000136  d50a              BPL      |L16.334|
;;;2498     {
;;;2499       /* Set ADC state */
;;;2500       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD3);
000138  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00013a  f4402080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40000
00013e  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2501   
;;;2502       /* Level out of window 3 callback */
;;;2503   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2504       hadc->LevelOutOfWindow3Callback(hadc);
;;;2505   #else
;;;2506       HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow3Callback(hadc);
000140  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000142  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow3Callback
;;;2507   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2508   
;;;2509       /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;2510       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD3);
000146  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
000148  f44f7000          MOV      r0,#0x200
00014c  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.334|
;;;2511     }
;;;2512   
;;;2513     /* ========== Check Overrun flag ========== */
;;;2514     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_OVR) == ADC_FLAG_OVR) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_OVR) == ADC_IT_OVR))
00014e  06f0              LSLS     r0,r6,#27
000150  d517              BPL      |L16.386|
000152  06e8              LSLS     r0,r5,#27
000154  d515              BPL      |L16.386|
;;;2515     {
;;;2516       /* If overrun is set to overwrite previous data (default setting),        */
;;;2517       /* overrun event is not considered as an error.                           */
;;;2518       /* (cf ref manual "Managing conversions without using the DMA and without */
;;;2519       /* overrun ")                                                             */
;;;2520       /* Exception for usage with DMA overrun event always considered as an     */
;;;2521       /* error.                                                                 */
;;;2522       if (hadc->Init.Overrun == ADC_OVR_DATA_PRESERVED)
000156  6b60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x34]
000158  b118              CBZ      r0,|L16.354|
;;;2523       {
;;;2524         overrun_error = 1UL;
;;;2525       }
;;;2526       else
;;;2527       {
;;;2528         /* Check DMA configuration */
;;;2529   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2530         if (tmp_multimode_config != LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;2531         {
;;;2532           /* Multimode (when feature is available) is enabled,
;;;2533              Common Control Register MDMA bits must be checked. */
;;;2534           if (LL_ADC_GetMultiDMATransfer(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance)) != LL_ADC_MULTI_REG_DMA_EACH_ADC)
;;;2535           {
;;;2536             overrun_error = 1UL;
;;;2537           }
;;;2538         }
;;;2539         else
;;;2540   #endif
;;;2541         {
;;;2542           /* Multimode not set or feature not available or ADC independent */
;;;2543           if ((hadc->Instance->CFGR & ADC_CFGR_DMAEN) != 0UL)
00015a  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
00015c  68c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0xc]
00015e  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
000160  d00c              BEQ      |L16.380|
                  |L16.354|
;;;2544           {
;;;2545             overrun_error = 1UL;
;;;2546           }
;;;2547         }
;;;2548       }
;;;2549   
;;;2550       if (overrun_error == 1UL)
;;;2551       {
;;;2552         /* Change ADC state to error state */
;;;2553         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_OVR);
000162  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000164  e000              B        |L16.360|
                  |L16.358|
000166  e024              B        |L16.434|
                  |L16.360|
000168  f4406080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x400
00016c  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2554   
;;;2555         /* Set ADC error code to overrun */
;;;2556         SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_OVR);
00016e  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
000170  f0400002          ORR      r0,r0,#2
000174  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
;;;2557   
;;;2558         /* Error callback */
;;;2559         /* Note: In case of overrun, ADC conversion data is preserved until     */
;;;2560         /*       flag OVR is reset.                                             */
;;;2561         /*       Therefore, old ADC conversion data can be retrieved in         */
;;;2562         /*       function "HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback()".                            */
;;;2563   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2564         hadc->ErrorCallback(hadc);
;;;2565   #else
;;;2566         HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback(hadc);
000176  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000178  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback
                  |L16.380|
;;;2567   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2568       }
;;;2569   
;;;2570       /* Clear ADC overrun flag */
;;;2571       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_OVR);
00017c  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00017e  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000180  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
                  |L16.386|
;;;2572     }
;;;2573   
;;;2574     /* ========== Check Injected context queue overflow flag ========== */
;;;2575     if (((tmp_isr & ADC_FLAG_JQOVF) == ADC_FLAG_JQOVF) && ((tmp_ier & ADC_IT_JQOVF) == ADC_IT_JQOVF))
000182  0570              LSLS     r0,r6,#21
000184  d53b              BPL      |L16.510|
000186  0568              LSLS     r0,r5,#21
000188  d539              BPL      |L16.510|
;;;2576     {
;;;2577       /* Change ADC state to overrun state */
;;;2578       SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_JQOVF);
00018a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00018c  f4404080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x4000
000190  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;2579   
;;;2580       /* Set ADC error code to Injected context queue overflow */
;;;2581       SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_JQOVF);
000192  6da0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
000194  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
000198  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]
;;;2582   
;;;2583       /* Clear the Injected context queue overflow flag */
;;;2584       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JQOVF);
00019a  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]
00019c  f44f6080          MOV      r0,#0x400
0001a0  6008              STR      r0,[r1,#0]
;;;2585   
;;;2586       /* Injected context queue overflow callback */
;;;2587   #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;2588       hadc->InjectedQueueOverflowCallback(hadc);
;;;2589   #else
;;;2590       HAL_ADCEx_InjectedQueueOverflowCallback(hadc);
0001a2  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0001a4  e8bd41f0          POP      {r4-r8,lr}
0001a8  e001              B        |L16.430|
                  |L16.426|
0001aa  e014              B        |L16.470|
0001ac  e015              B        |L16.474|
                  |L16.430|
0001ae  f7ffbffe          B.W      HAL_ADCEx_InjectedQueueOverflowCallback
                  |L16.434|
0001b2  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;2320
0001b4  6841              LDR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;2320
0001b6  f021010c          BIC      r1,r1,#0xc            ;2320
0001ba  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;2320
0001bc  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2323
0001be  f4207080          BIC      r0,r0,#0x100          ;2323
0001c2  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2323
0001c4  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2325
0001c6  04c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#19             ;2325
0001c8  f53faf57          BMI      |L16.122|
0001cc  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2327
0001ce  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1              ;2327
0001d2  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2327
0001d4  e751              B        |L16.122|
                  |L16.470|
0001d6  2701              MOVS     r7,#1                 ;2327
0001d8  e76a              B        |L16.176|
                  |L16.474|
0001da  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;2423
0001dc  6841              LDR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;2423
0001de  f0210160          BIC      r1,r1,#0x60           ;2423
0001e2  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;2423
0001e4  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2426
0001e6  f4205080          BIC      r0,r0,#0x1000         ;2426
0001ea  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2426
0001ec  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2428
0001ee  05c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#23             ;2428
0001f0  f53faf7b          BMI      |L16.234|
0001f4  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2430
0001f6  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1              ;2430
0001fa  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2430
0001fc  e775              B        |L16.234|
                  |L16.510|
;;;2591   #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;2592     }
;;;2593   
;;;2594   }
0001fe  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;2595   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_Init PROC
;;;392      */
;;;393    HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Init(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b5f8              PUSH     {r3-r7,lr}
;;;394    {
;;;395      HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status = HAL_OK;
000002  f04f0500          MOV      r5,#0
000006  0004              MOVS     r4,r0                 ;394
;;;396      uint32_t tmpCFGR;
;;;397      uint32_t tmp_adc_reg_is_conversion_on_going;
;;;398      __IO uint32_t wait_loop_index = 0UL;
000008  462e              MOV      r6,r5
00000a  9500              STR      r5,[sp,#0]            ;394
00000c  d002              BEQ      |L17.20|
;;;399      uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular;
;;;400      uint32_t tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected;
;;;401    
;;;402      /* Check ADC handle */
;;;403      if (hadc == NULL)
;;;404      {
;;;405        return HAL_ERROR;
;;;406      }
;;;407    
;;;408      /* Check the parameters */
;;;409      assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;410      assert_param(IS_ADC_CLOCKPRESCALER(hadc->Init.ClockPrescaler));
;;;411      assert_param(IS_ADC_RESOLUTION(hadc->Init.Resolution));
;;;412    #if defined(ADC_CFGR_DFSDMCFG) &&defined(DFSDM1_Channel0)
;;;413      assert_param(IS_ADC_DFSDMCFG_MODE(hadc));
;;;414    #endif
;;;415      assert_param(IS_ADC_DATA_ALIGN(hadc->Init.DataAlign));
;;;416      assert_param(IS_ADC_SCAN_MODE(hadc->Init.ScanConvMode));
;;;417      assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(hadc->Init.ContinuousConvMode));
;;;418      assert_param(IS_ADC_EXTTRIG_EDGE(hadc->Init.ExternalTrigConvEdge));
;;;419      assert_param(IS_ADC_EXTTRIG(hadc, hadc->Init.ExternalTrigConv));
;;;420      assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(hadc->Init.DMAContinuousRequests));
;;;421      assert_param(IS_ADC_EOC_SELECTION(hadc->Init.EOCSelection));
;;;422      assert_param(IS_ADC_OVERRUN(hadc->Init.Overrun));
;;;423      assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(hadc->Init.LowPowerAutoWait));
;;;424      assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(hadc->Init.OversamplingMode));
;;;425    
;;;426      if (hadc->Init.ScanConvMode != ADC_SCAN_DISABLE)
;;;427      {
;;;428        assert_param(IS_ADC_REGULAR_NB_CONV(hadc->Init.NbrOfConversion));
;;;429        assert_param(IS_FUNCTIONAL_STATE(hadc->Init.DiscontinuousConvMode));
;;;430    
;;;431        if (hadc->Init.DiscontinuousConvMode == ENABLE)
;;;432        {
;;;433          assert_param(IS_ADC_REGULAR_DISCONT_NUMBER(hadc->Init.NbrOfDiscConversion));
;;;434        }
;;;435      }
;;;436    
;;;437      /* DISCEN and CONT bits cannot be set at the same time */
;;;438      assert_param(!((hadc->Init.DiscontinuousConvMode == ENABLE) && (hadc->Init.ContinuousConvMode == ENABLE)));
;;;439    
;;;440      /* Actions performed only if ADC is coming from state reset:                */
;;;441      /* - Initialization of ADC MSP                                              */
;;;442      if (hadc->State == HAL_ADC_STATE_RESET)
00000e  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000010  b110              CBZ      r0,|L17.24|
000012  e007              B        |L17.36|
                  |L17.20|
000014  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;405
;;;443      {
;;;444    #if (USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
;;;445        /* Init the ADC Callback settings */
;;;446        hadc->ConvCpltCallback              = HAL_ADC_ConvCpltCallback;                 /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;447        hadc->ConvHalfCpltCallback          = HAL_ADC_ConvHalfCpltCallback;             /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;448        hadc->LevelOutOfWindowCallback      = HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback;         /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;449        hadc->ErrorCallback                 = HAL_ADC_ErrorCallback;                    /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;450        hadc->InjectedConvCpltCallback      = HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConvCpltCallback;       /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;451        hadc->InjectedQueueOverflowCallback = HAL_ADCEx_InjectedQueueOverflowCallback;  /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;452        hadc->LevelOutOfWindow2Callback     = HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow2Callback;      /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;453        hadc->LevelOutOfWindow3Callback     = HAL_ADCEx_LevelOutOfWindow3Callback;      /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;454        hadc->EndOfSamplingCallback         = HAL_ADCEx_EndOfSamplingCallback;          /* Legacy weak callback */
;;;455    
;;;456        if (hadc->MspInitCallback == NULL)
;;;457        {
;;;458          hadc->MspInitCallback = HAL_ADC_MspInit; /* Legacy weak MspInit  */
;;;459        }
;;;460    
;;;461        /* Init the low level hardware */
;;;462        hadc->MspInitCallback(hadc);
;;;463    #else
;;;464        /* Init the low level hardware */
;;;465        HAL_ADC_MspInit(hadc);
;;;466    #endif /* USE_HAL_ADC_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
;;;467    
;;;468        /* Set ADC error code to none */
;;;469        ADC_CLEAR_ERRORCODE(hadc);
;;;470    
;;;471        /* Initialize Lock */
;;;472        hadc->Lock = HAL_UNLOCKED;
;;;473      }
;;;474    
;;;475      /* - Exit from deep-power-down mode and ADC voltage regulator enable        */
;;;476      if (LL_ADC_IsDeepPowerDownEnabled(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
;;;477      {
;;;478        /* Disable ADC deep power down mode */
;;;479        LL_ADC_DisableDeepPowerDown(hadc->Instance);
;;;480    
;;;481        /* System was in deep power down mode, calibration must
;;;482         be relaunched or a previously saved calibration factor
;;;483         re-applied once the ADC voltage regulator is enabled */
;;;484      }
;;;485    
;;;486      if (LL_ADC_IsInternalRegulatorEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
;;;487      {
;;;488        /* Enable ADC internal voltage regulator */
;;;489        LL_ADC_EnableInternalRegulator(hadc->Instance);
;;;490    
;;;491        /* Note: Variable divided by 2 to compensate partially              */
;;;492        /*       CPU processing cycles, scaling in us split to not          */
;;;493        /*       exceed 32 bits register capacity and handle low frequency. */
;;;494        wait_loop_index = ((LL_ADC_DELAY_INTERNAL_REGUL_STAB_US / 10UL) * ((SystemCoreClock / (100000UL * 2UL)) + 1UL));
;;;495        while (wait_loop_index != 0UL)
;;;496        {
;;;497          wait_loop_index--;
;;;498        }
;;;499      }
;;;500    
;;;501      /* Verification that ADC voltage regulator is correctly enabled, whether    */
;;;502      /* or not ADC is coming from state reset (if any potential problem of       */
;;;503      /* clocking, voltage regulator would not be enabled).                       */
;;;504      if (LL_ADC_IsInternalRegulatorEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
;;;505      {
;;;506        /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;507        SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;508    
;;;509        /* Set ADC error code to ADC peripheral internal error */
;;;510        SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;511    
;;;512        tmp_hal_status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;513      }
;;;514    
;;;515      /* Configuration of ADC parameters if previous preliminary actions are      */
;;;516      /* correctly completed and if there is no conversion on going on regular    */
;;;517      /* group (ADC may already be enabled at this point if HAL_ADC_Init() is     */
;;;518      /* called to update a parameter on the fly).                                */
;;;519      tmp_adc_reg_is_conversion_on_going = LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
;;;520    
;;;521      if (((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL) == 0UL)
;;;522          && (tmp_adc_reg_is_conversion_on_going == 0UL)
;;;523         )
;;;524      {
;;;525        /* Set ADC state */
;;;526        ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;527                          HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY,
;;;528                          HAL_ADC_STATE_BUSY_INTERNAL);
;;;529    
;;;530        /* Configuration of common ADC parameters                                 */
;;;531    
;;;532        /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                            */
;;;533        /* Parameters that can be updated only when ADC is disabled:              */
;;;534        /*  - clock configuration                                                 */
;;;535        if (LL_ADC_IsEnabled(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
;;;536        {
;;;537          if (__LL_ADC_IS_ENABLED_ALL_COMMON_INSTANCE(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance)) == 0UL)
;;;538          {
;;;539            /* Reset configuration of ADC common register CCR:                      */
;;;540            /*                                                                      */
;;;541            /*   - ADC clock mode and ACC prescaler (CKMODE and PRESC bits)are set  */
;;;542            /*     according to adc->Init.ClockPrescaler. It selects the clock      */
;;;543            /*    source and sets the clock division factor.                        */
;;;544            /*                                                                      */
;;;545            /* Some parameters of this register are not reset, since they are set   */
;;;546            /* by other functions and must be kept in case of usage of this         */
;;;547            /* function on the fly (update of a parameter of ADC_InitTypeDef        */
;;;548            /* without needing to reconfigure all other ADC groups/channels         */
;;;549            /* parameters):                                                         */
;;;550            /*   - when multimode feature is available, multimode-related           */
;;;551            /*     parameters: MDMA, DMACFG, DELAY, DUAL (set by API                */
;;;552            /*     HAL_ADCEx_MultiModeConfigChannel() )                             */
;;;553            /*   - internal measurement paths: Vbat, temperature sensor, Vref       */
;;;554            /*     (set into HAL_ADC_ConfigChannel() or                             */
;;;555            /*     HAL_ADCEx_InjectedConfigChannel() )                              */
;;;556            LL_ADC_SetCommonClock(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance), hadc->Init.ClockPrescaler);
;;;557          }
;;;558        }
;;;559    
;;;560        /* Configuration of ADC:                                                  */
;;;561        /*  - resolution                               Init.Resolution            */
;;;562        /*  - data alignment                           Init.DataAlign             */
;;;563        /*  - external trigger to start conversion     Init.ExternalTrigConv      */
;;;564        /*  - external trigger polarity                Init.ExternalTrigConvEdge  */
;;;565        /*  - continuous conversion mode               Init.ContinuousConvMode    */
;;;566        /*  - overrun                                  Init.Overrun               */
;;;567        /*  - discontinuous mode                       Init.DiscontinuousConvMode */
;;;568        /*  - discontinuous mode channel count         Init.NbrOfDiscConversion   */
;;;569        tmpCFGR  = (ADC_CFGR_CONTINUOUS((uint32_t)hadc->Init.ContinuousConvMode)           |
;;;570                    hadc->Init.Overrun                                                     |
;;;571                    hadc->Init.DataAlign                                                   |
;;;572                    hadc->Init.Resolution                                                  |
;;;573                    ADC_CFGR_REG_DISCONTINUOUS((uint32_t)hadc->Init.DiscontinuousConvMode));
;;;574    
;;;575        if (hadc->Init.DiscontinuousConvMode == ENABLE)
;;;576        {
;;;577          tmpCFGR |= ADC_CFGR_DISCONTINUOUS_NUM(hadc->Init.NbrOfDiscConversion);
;;;578        }
;;;579    
;;;580        /* Enable external trigger if trigger selection is different of software  */
;;;581        /* start.                                                                 */
;;;582        /* Note: This configuration keeps the hardware feature of parameter       */
;;;583        /*       ExternalTrigConvEdge "trigger edge none" equivalent to           */
;;;584        /*       software start.                                                  */
;;;585        if (hadc->Init.ExternalTrigConv != ADC_SOFTWARE_START)
;;;586        {
;;;587          tmpCFGR |= ((hadc->Init.ExternalTrigConv & ADC_CFGR_EXTSEL)
;;;588                      | hadc->Init.ExternalTrigConvEdge
;;;589                     );
;;;590        }
;;;591    
;;;592        /* Update Configuration Register CFGR */
;;;593        MODIFY_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_FIELDS_1, tmpCFGR);
;;;594    
;;;595        /* Parameters update conditioned to ADC state:                            */
;;;596        /* Parameters that can be updated when ADC is disabled or enabled without */
;;;597        /* conversion on going on regular and injected groups:                    */
;;;598        /*  - DMA continuous request          Init.DMAContinuousRequests          */
;;;599        /*  - LowPowerAutoWait feature        Init.LowPowerAutoWait               */
;;;600        /*  - Oversampling parameters         Init.Oversampling                   */
;;;601        tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular = LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
;;;602        tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected = LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance);
;;;603        if ((tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_regular == 0UL)
;;;604            && (tmp_adc_is_conversion_on_going_injected == 0UL)
;;;605           )
;;;606        {
;;;607          tmpCFGR = (ADC_CFGR_DFSDM(hadc)                                            |
;;;608                     ADC_CFGR_AUTOWAIT((uint32_t)hadc->Init.LowPowerAutoWait)        |
;;;609                     ADC_CFGR_DMACONTREQ((uint32_t)hadc->Init.DMAContinuousRequests));
;;;610    
;;;611          MODIFY_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_FIELDS_2, tmpCFGR);
;;;612    
;;;613          if (hadc->Init.OversamplingMode == ENABLE)
;;;614          {
;;;615            assert_param(IS_ADC_OVERSAMPLING_RATIO(hadc->Init.Oversampling.Ratio));
;;;616            assert_param(IS_ADC_RIGHT_BIT_SHIFT(hadc->Init.Oversampling.RightBitShift));
;;;617            assert_param(IS_ADC_TRIGGERED_OVERSAMPLING_MODE(hadc->Init.Oversampling.TriggeredMode));
;;;618            assert_param(IS_ADC_REGOVERSAMPLING_MODE(hadc->Init.Oversampling.OversamplingStopReset));
;;;619    
;;;620            /* Configuration of Oversampler:                                      */
;;;621            /*  - Oversampling Ratio                                              */
;;;622            /*  - Right bit shift                                                 */
;;;623            /*  - Triggered mode                                                  */
;;;624            /*  - Oversampling mode (continued/resumed)                           */
;;;625            MODIFY_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR2,
;;;626                       ADC_CFGR2_OVSR  |
;;;627                       ADC_CFGR2_OVSS  |
;;;628                       ADC_CFGR2_TROVS |
;;;629                       ADC_CFGR2_ROVSM,
;;;630                       ADC_CFGR2_ROVSE                       |
;;;631                       hadc->Init.Oversampling.Ratio         |
;;;632                       hadc->Init.Oversampling.RightBitShift |
;;;633                       hadc->Init.Oversampling.TriggeredMode |
;;;634                       hadc->Init.Oversampling.OversamplingStopReset
;;;635                      );
;;;636          }
;;;637          else
;;;638          {
;;;639            /* Disable ADC oversampling scope on ADC group regular */
;;;640            CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR2, ADC_CFGR2_ROVSE);
;;;641          }
;;;642    
;;;643        }
;;;644    
;;;645        /* Configuration of regular group sequencer:                              */
;;;646        /* - if scan mode is disabled, regular channels sequence length is set to */
;;;647        /*   0x00: 1 channel converted (channel on regular rank 1)                */
;;;648        /*   Parameter "NbrOfConversion" is discarded.                            */
;;;649        /*   Note: Scan mode is not present by hardware on this device, but       */
;;;650        /*   emulated by software for alignment over all STM32 devices.           */
;;;651        /* - if scan mode is enabled, regular channels sequence length is set to  */
;;;652        /*   parameter "NbrOfConversion".                                         */
;;;653    
;;;654        if (hadc->Init.ScanConvMode == ADC_SCAN_ENABLE)
;;;655        {
;;;656          /* Set number of ranks in regular group sequencer */
;;;657          MODIFY_REG(hadc->Instance->SQR1, ADC_SQR1_L, (hadc->Init.NbrOfConversion - (uint8_t)1));
;;;658        }
;;;659        else
;;;660        {
;;;661          CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->SQR1, ADC_SQR1_L);
;;;662        }
;;;663    
;;;664        /* Initialize the ADC state */
;;;665        /* Clear HAL_ADC_STATE_BUSY_INTERNAL bit, set HAL_ADC_STATE_READY bit */
;;;666        ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_BUSY_INTERNAL, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;667      }
;;;668      else
;;;669      {
;;;670        /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;671        SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_INTERNAL);
;;;672    
;;;673        tmp_hal_status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;674      }
;;;675    
;;;676      /* Return function status */
;;;677      return tmp_hal_status;
;;;678    }
000016  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L17.24|
000018  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;465
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_ADC_MspInit
00001e  65a6              STR      r6,[r4,#0x58]         ;469
000020  f8846050          STRB     r6,[r4,#0x50]         ;472
                  |L17.36|
000024  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;472
000026  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;472
000028  f3c17140          UBFX     r1,r1,#29,#1          ;472
00002c  b119              CBZ      r1,|L17.54|
00002e  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;476
000030  4a57              LDR      r2,|L17.400|
000032  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2              ;476
000034  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;476
                  |L17.54|
000036  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;476
000038  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;476
00003a  f3c17100          UBFX     r1,r1,#28,#1          ;476
00003e  b989              CBNZ     r1,|L17.100|
000040  6881              LDR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;486
000042  4a54              LDR      r2,|L17.404|
000044  4011              ANDS     r1,r1,r2              ;486
000046  f0415180          ORR      r1,r1,#0x10000000     ;486
00004a  6081              STR      r1,[r0,#8]            ;486
00004c  4852              LDR      r0,|L17.408|
00004e  4953              LDR      r1,|L17.412|
000050  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;494  ; SystemCoreClock
000052  fbb0f0f1          UDIV     r0,r0,r1              ;494
000056  0040              LSLS     r0,r0,#1              ;494
000058  1c80              ADDS     r0,r0,#2              ;494
00005a  e000              B        |L17.94|
                  |L17.92|

                  |L17.94|
00005e  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;494
000060  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;494
000062  d1fb              BNE      |L17.92|
                  |L17.100|
000064  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;494

000068  f3c17100          UBFX     r1,r1,#28,#1          ;494
00006c  b941              CBNZ     r1,|L17.128|
00006e  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;507

                  |L17.128|
000080  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
000084  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;521
000086  06c9              LSLS     r1,r1,#27             ;521
000088  d400              BMI      |L17.140|
00008a  b130              CBZ      r0,|L17.154|
                  |L17.140|

000098  bdf8              POP      {r3-r7,pc}
                  |L17.154|
00009a  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;526

0000ae  d10b              BNE      |L17.200|

000112  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;602
000114  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_INJ_IsConversionOngoing
000118  4330              ORRS     r0,r0,r6              ;603
00011a  d115              BNE      |L17.328|
00011c  7e20              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x18]         ;607

000124  ea400041          ORR      r0,r0,r1,LSL #1       ;607

                  |L17.328|
000148  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]         ;654

000154  d011              BEQ      |L17.378|
000156  e013              B        |L17.384|
                  |L17.344|
000158  e9d4010f          LDRD     r0,r1,[r4,#0x3c]      ;654
00015c  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1              ;625
00015e  e9d41211          LDRD     r1,r2,[r4,#0x44]      ;625
000162  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2              ;625

000166  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;625

                  |L17.378|
00017a  69e2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x1c]         ;657

00017e  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2              ;657
                  |L17.384|
000180  6301              STR      r1,[r0,#0x30]         ;661

00018c  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;666
00018e  e782              B        |L17.150|
;;;679    
                          ENDP

                  |L17.400|
                          DCD      0x5fffffc0
                  |L17.404|
                          DCD      0x7fffffc0
                  |L17.408|

                  |L17.412|

                  |L17.428|
