                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback PROC
;;;2630     */
;;;2631   __weak void HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;2632   {
;;;2633     /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;2634     UNUSED(hadc);
;;;2635   
;;;2636     /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;2637               function HAL_ADC_LevelOutOfWindowCallback must be implemented in the user file.
;;;2638     */
;;;2639   }
;;;2640   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_MspDeInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_MspDeInit PROC
;;;913      */
;;;914    __weak void HAL_ADC_MspDeInit(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;915    {
;;;916      /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;917      UNUSED(hadc);
;;;918    
;;;919      /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;920                function HAL_ADC_MspDeInit must be implemented in the user file.
;;;921       */
;;;922    }
;;;923    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_MspInit||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_MspInit PROC
;;;896      */
;;;897    __weak void HAL_ADC_MspInit(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  4770              BX       lr
;;;898    {
;;;899      /* Prevent unused argument(s) compilation warning */
;;;900      UNUSED(hadc);
;;;901    
;;;902      /* NOTE : This function should not be modified. When the callback is needed,
;;;903                function HAL_ADC_MspInit must be implemented in the user file.
;;;904       */
;;;905    }
;;;906    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_PollForConversion||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_PollForConversion PROC
;;;1392     */
;;;1393   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_PollForConversion(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, uint32_t Timeout)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1394   {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1395     uint32_t tickstart;
;;;1396     uint32_t tmp_Flag_End;
;;;1397     uint32_t tmp_cfgr;
;;;1398   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1399     const ADC_TypeDef *tmpADC_Master;
;;;1400     uint32_t tmp_multimode_config = LL_ADC_GetMultimode(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1401   #endif
;;;1402   
;;;1403     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1404     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1405   
;;;1406     /* If end of conversion selected to end of sequence conversions */
;;;1407     if (hadc->Init.EOCSelection == ADC_EOC_SEQ_CONV)
000006  6940              LDR      r0,[r0,#0x14]
000008  460e              MOV      r6,r1                 ;1394
00000a  2808              CMP      r0,#8
00000c  d00a              BEQ      |L21.36|
;;;1408     {
;;;1409       tmp_Flag_End = ADC_FLAG_EOS;
;;;1410     }
;;;1411     /* If end of conversion selected to end of unitary conversion */
;;;1412     else /* ADC_EOC_SINGLE_CONV */
;;;1413     {
;;;1414       /* Verification that ADC configuration is compliant with polling for      */
;;;1415       /* each conversion:                                                       */
;;;1416       /* Particular case is ADC configured in DMA mode and ADC sequencer with   */
;;;1417       /* several ranks and polling for end of each conversion.                  */
;;;1418       /* For code simplicity sake, this particular case is generalized to       */
;;;1419       /* ADC configured in DMA mode and and polling for end of each conversion. */
;;;1420   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1421       if ((tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1422           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;1423           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;1424          )
;;;1425       {
;;;1426         /* Check ADC DMA mode in independent mode on ADC group regular */
;;;1427         if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_DMAEN) != 0UL)
;;;1428         {
;;;1429           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_CONFIG);
;;;1430           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1431         }
;;;1432         else
;;;1433         {
;;;1434           tmp_Flag_End = (ADC_FLAG_EOC);
;;;1435         }
;;;1436       }
;;;1437       else
;;;1438       {
;;;1439         /* Check ADC DMA mode in multimode on ADC group regular */
;;;1440         if (LL_ADC_GetMultiDMATransfer(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance)) != LL_ADC_MULTI_REG_DMA_EACH_ADC)
;;;1441         {
;;;1442           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_CONFIG);
;;;1443           return HAL_ERROR;
;;;1444         }
;;;1445         else
;;;1446         {
;;;1447           tmp_Flag_End = (ADC_FLAG_EOC);
;;;1448         }
;;;1449       }
;;;1450   #else
;;;1451       /* Check ADC DMA mode */
;;;1452       if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_DMAEN) != 0UL)
00000e  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000010  68c0              LDR      r0,[r0,#0xc]
000012  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
000014  d008              BEQ      |L21.40|
;;;1453       {
;;;1454         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_CONFIG);
000016  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
000018  f0400020          ORR      r0,r0,#0x20
00001c  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;1455         return HAL_ERROR;
00001e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L21.32|
;;;1456       }
;;;1457       else
;;;1458       {
;;;1459         tmp_Flag_End = (ADC_FLAG_EOC);
;;;1460       }
;;;1461   #endif
;;;1462     }
;;;1463   
;;;1464     /* Get tick count */
;;;1465     tickstart = HAL_GetTick();
;;;1466   
;;;1467     /* Wait until End of unitary conversion or sequence conversions flag is raised */
;;;1468     while ((hadc->Instance->ISR & tmp_Flag_End) == 0UL)
;;;1469     {
;;;1470       /* Check if timeout is disabled (set to infinite wait) */
;;;1471       if (Timeout != HAL_MAX_DELAY)
;;;1472       {
;;;1473         if (((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > Timeout) || (Timeout == 0UL))
;;;1474         {
;;;1475           /* New check to avoid false timeout detection in case of preemption */
;;;1476           if ((hadc->Instance->ISR & tmp_Flag_End) == 0UL)
;;;1477           {
;;;1478             /* Update ADC state machine to timeout */
;;;1479             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_TIMEOUT);
;;;1480   
;;;1481             /* Process unlocked */
;;;1482             __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1483   
;;;1484             return HAL_TIMEOUT;
;;;1485           }
;;;1486         }
;;;1487       }
;;;1488     }
;;;1489   
;;;1490     /* Update ADC state machine */
;;;1491     SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC);
;;;1492   
;;;1493     /* Determine whether any further conversion upcoming on group regular       */
;;;1494     /* by external trigger, continuous mode or scan sequence on going.          */
;;;1495     if ((LL_ADC_REG_IsTriggerSourceSWStart(hadc->Instance) != 0UL)
;;;1496         && (hadc->Init.ContinuousConvMode == DISABLE)
;;;1497        )
;;;1498     {
;;;1499       /* Check whether end of sequence is reached */
;;;1500       if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOS))
;;;1501       {
;;;1502         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1503         CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;1504   
;;;1505         if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) == 0UL)
;;;1506         {
;;;1507           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;1508         }
;;;1509       }
;;;1510     }
;;;1511   
;;;1512     /* Get relevant register CFGR in ADC instance of ADC master or slave        */
;;;1513     /* in function of multimode state (for devices with multimode               */
;;;1514     /* available).                                                              */
;;;1515   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1516     if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;1517         || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1518         || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;1519         || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;1520        )
;;;1521     {
;;;1522       /* Retrieve handle ADC CFGR register */
;;;1523       tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
;;;1524     }
;;;1525     else
;;;1526     {
;;;1527       /* Retrieve Master ADC CFGR register */
;;;1528       tmpADC_Master = __LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance);
;;;1529       tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(tmpADC_Master->CFGR);
;;;1530     }
;;;1531   #else
;;;1532     /* Retrieve handle ADC CFGR register */
;;;1533     tmp_cfgr = READ_REG(hadc->Instance->CFGR);
;;;1534   #endif
;;;1535   
;;;1536     /* Clear polled flag */
;;;1537     if (tmp_Flag_End == ADC_FLAG_EOS)
;;;1538     {
;;;1539       __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOS);
;;;1540     }
;;;1541     else
;;;1542     {
;;;1543       /* Clear end of conversion EOC flag of regular group if low power feature */
;;;1544       /* "LowPowerAutoWait " is disabled, to not interfere with this feature    */
;;;1545       /* until data register is read using function HAL_ADC_GetValue().         */
;;;1546       if (READ_BIT(tmp_cfgr, ADC_CFGR_AUTDLY) == 0UL)
;;;1547       {
;;;1548         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOC | ADC_FLAG_EOS));
;;;1549       }
;;;1550     }
;;;1551   
;;;1552     /* Return function status */
;;;1553     return HAL_OK;
;;;1554   }
000020  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
                  |L21.36|
000024  2508              MOVS     r5,#8                 ;1409
000026  e000              B        |L21.42|
                  |L21.40|
000028  2504              MOVS     r5,#4                 ;1459
                  |L21.42|

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_PollForEvent||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_PollForEvent PROC
;;;1575     */
;;;1576   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_PollForEvent(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, uint32_t EventType, uint32_t Timeout)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;1577   {
000004  4616              MOV      r6,r2
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
000008  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1578     uint32_t tickstart;
;;;1579   
;;;1580     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1581     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1582     assert_param(IS_ADC_EVENT_TYPE(EventType));
;;;1583   
;;;1584     /* Get tick count */
;;;1585     tickstart = HAL_GetTick();
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
00000e  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;1586   
;;;1587     /* Check selected event flag */
;;;1588     while (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, EventType) == 0UL)
000010  e016              B        |L22.64|
                  |L22.18|
;;;1589     {
;;;1590       /* Check if timeout is disabled (set to infinite wait) */
;;;1591       if (Timeout != HAL_MAX_DELAY)
000012  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1
000014  d014              BEQ      |L22.64|
;;;1592       {
;;;1593         if (((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > Timeout) || (Timeout == 0UL))
000016  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_GetTick
00001a  1bc0              SUBS     r0,r0,r7
00001c  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
00001e  d800              BHI      |L22.34|
000020  b976              CBNZ     r6,|L22.64|
                  |L22.34|
;;;1594         {
;;;1595           /* New check to avoid false timeout detection in case of preemption */
;;;1596           if (__HAL_ADC_GET_FLAG(hadc, EventType) == 0UL)
000022  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
000024  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000026  ea350000          BICS     r0,r5,r0
00002a  d009              BEQ      |L22.64|
;;;1597           {
;;;1598             /* Update ADC state machine to timeout */
;;;1599             SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_TIMEOUT);
00002c  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
00002e  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
000032  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]
;;;1600   
;;;1601             /* Process unlocked */
;;;1602             __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
000034  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000036  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;1603   
;;;1604             return HAL_TIMEOUT;
00003a  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
                  |L22.60|
;;;1605           }
;;;1606         }
;;;1607       }
;;;1608     }
;;;1609   
;;;1610     switch (EventType)
;;;1611     {
;;;1612       /* End Of Sampling event */
;;;1613       case ADC_EOSMP_EVENT:
;;;1614         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1615         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOSMP);
;;;1616   
;;;1617         /* Clear the End Of Sampling flag */
;;;1618         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_EOSMP);
;;;1619   
;;;1620         break;
;;;1621   
;;;1622       /* Analog watchdog (level out of window) event */
;;;1623       /* Note: In case of several analog watchdog enabled, if needed to know      */
;;;1624       /* which one triggered and on which ADCx, test ADC state of analog watchdog */
;;;1625       /* flags HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD1/2/3 using function "HAL_ADC_GetState()".        */
;;;1626       /* For example:                                                             */
;;;1627       /*  " if ((HAL_ADC_GetState(hadc1) & HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD1) != 0UL) "          */
;;;1628       /*  " if ((HAL_ADC_GetState(hadc1) & HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD2) != 0UL) "          */
;;;1629       /*  " if ((HAL_ADC_GetState(hadc1) & HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD3) != 0UL) "          */
;;;1630   
;;;1631       /* Check analog watchdog 1 flag */
;;;1632       case ADC_AWD_EVENT:
;;;1633         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1634         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD1);
;;;1635   
;;;1636         /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;1637         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD1);
;;;1638   
;;;1639         break;
;;;1640   
;;;1641       /* Check analog watchdog 2 flag */
;;;1642       case ADC_AWD2_EVENT:
;;;1643         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1644         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD2);
;;;1645   
;;;1646         /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;1647         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD2);
;;;1648   
;;;1649         break;
;;;1650   
;;;1651       /* Check analog watchdog 3 flag */
;;;1652       case ADC_AWD3_EVENT:
;;;1653         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1654         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_AWD3);
;;;1655   
;;;1656         /* Clear ADC analog watchdog flag */
;;;1657         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_AWD3);
;;;1658   
;;;1659         break;
;;;1660   
;;;1661       /* Injected context queue overflow event */
;;;1662       case ADC_JQOVF_EVENT:
;;;1663         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1664         SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_JQOVF);
;;;1665   
;;;1666         /* Set ADC error code to Injected context queue overflow */
;;;1667         SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_JQOVF);
;;;1668   
;;;1669         /* Clear ADC Injected context queue overflow flag */
;;;1670         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_JQOVF);
;;;1671   
;;;1672         break;
;;;1673   
;;;1674       /* Overrun event */
;;;1675       default: /* Case ADC_OVR_EVENT */
;;;1676         /* If overrun is set to overwrite previous data, overrun event is not     */
;;;1677         /* considered as an error.                                                */
;;;1678         /* (cf ref manual "Managing conversions without using the DMA and without */
;;;1679         /* overrun ")                                                             */
;;;1680         if (hadc->Init.Overrun == ADC_OVR_DATA_PRESERVED)
;;;1681         {
;;;1682           /* Set ADC state */
;;;1683           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_OVR);
;;;1684   
;;;1685           /* Set ADC error code to overrun */
;;;1686           SET_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, HAL_ADC_ERROR_OVR);
;;;1687         }
;;;1688         else
;;;1689         {
;;;1690           /* Clear ADC Overrun flag only if Overrun is set to ADC_OVR_DATA_OVERWRITTEN
;;;1691              otherwise, data register is potentially overwritten by new converted data as soon
;;;1692              as OVR is cleared. */
;;;1693           __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, ADC_FLAG_OVR);
;;;1694         }
;;;1695         break;
;;;1696     }
;;;1697   
;;;1698     /* Return function status */
;;;1699     return HAL_OK;
;;;1700   }

                  |L22.64|

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Start||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_Start PROC
;;;1203     */
;;;1204   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Start(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1205   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1206     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;1207   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1208     const ADC_TypeDef *tmpADC_Master;
;;;1209     uint32_t tmp_multimode_config = LL_ADC_GetMultimode(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1210   #endif
;;;1211   
;;;1212     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1213     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1214   
;;;1215     /* Perform ADC enable and conversion start if no conversion is on going */
;;;1216     if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000004  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000006  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
00000a  b110              CBZ      r0,|L23.18|
;;;1217     {
;;;1218       /* Process locked */
;;;1219       __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
;;;1220   
;;;1221       /* Enable the ADC peripheral */
;;;1222       tmp_hal_status = ADC_Enable(hadc);
;;;1223   
;;;1224       /* Start conversion if ADC is effectively enabled */
;;;1225       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1226       {
;;;1227         /* Set ADC state                                                        */
;;;1228         /* - Clear state bitfield related to regular group conversion results   */
;;;1229         /* - Set state bitfield related to regular operation                    */
;;;1230         ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;1231                           HAL_ADC_STATE_READY | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_OVR | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOSMP,
;;;1232                           HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;1233   
;;;1234   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1235         /* Reset HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE bit
;;;1236           - if ADC instance is master or if multimode feature is not available
;;;1237           - if multimode setting is disabled (ADC instance slave in independent mode) */
;;;1238         if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;1239             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1240            )
;;;1241         {
;;;1242           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE);
;;;1243         }
;;;1244   #endif
;;;1245   
;;;1246         /* Set ADC error code */
;;;1247         /* Check if a conversion is on going on ADC group injected */
;;;1248         if (HAL_IS_BIT_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY))
;;;1249         {
;;;1250           /* Reset ADC error code fields related to regular conversions only */
;;;1251           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, (HAL_ADC_ERROR_OVR | HAL_ADC_ERROR_DMA));
;;;1252         }
;;;1253         else
;;;1254         {
;;;1255           /* Reset all ADC error code fields */
;;;1256           ADC_CLEAR_ERRORCODE(hadc);
;;;1257         }
;;;1258   
;;;1259         /* Clear ADC group regular conversion flag and overrun flag               */
;;;1260         /* (To ensure of no unknown state from potential previous ADC operations) */
;;;1261         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOC | ADC_FLAG_EOS | ADC_FLAG_OVR));
;;;1262   
;;;1263         /* Process unlocked */
;;;1264         /* Unlock before starting ADC conversions: in case of potential         */
;;;1265         /* interruption, to let the process to ADC IRQ Handler.                 */
;;;1266         __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1267   
;;;1268         /* Enable conversion of regular group.                                  */
;;;1269         /* If software start has been selected, conversion starts immediately.  */
;;;1270         /* If external trigger has been selected, conversion will start at next */
;;;1271         /* trigger event.                                                       */
;;;1272         /* Case of multimode enabled (when multimode feature is available):     */
;;;1273         /*  - if ADC is slave and dual regular conversions are enabled, ADC is  */
;;;1274         /*    enabled only (conversion is not started),                         */
;;;1275         /*  - if ADC is master, ADC is enabled and conversion is started.       */
;;;1276   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1277         if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;1278             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1279             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;1280             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;1281            )
;;;1282         {
;;;1283           /* ADC instance is not a multimode slave instance with multimode regular conversions enabled */
;;;1284           if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1285           {
;;;1286             ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1287           }
;;;1288   
;;;1289           /* Start ADC group regular conversion */
;;;1290           LL_ADC_REG_StartConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;1291         }
;;;1292         else
;;;1293         {
;;;1294           /* ADC instance is a multimode slave instance with multimode regular conversions enabled */
;;;1295           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE);
;;;1296           /* if Master ADC JAUTO bit is set, update Slave State in setting
;;;1297              HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY bit and in resetting HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC bit */
;;;1298           tmpADC_Master = __LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance);
;;;1299           if (READ_BIT(tmpADC_Master->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1300           {
;;;1301             ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1302           }
;;;1303   
;;;1304         }
;;;1305   #else
;;;1306         if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1307         {
;;;1308           ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1309         }
;;;1310   
;;;1311         /* Start ADC group regular conversion */
;;;1312         LL_ADC_REG_StartConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;1313   #endif
;;;1314       }
;;;1315       else
;;;1316       {
;;;1317         /* Process unlocked */
;;;1318         __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1319       }
;;;1320     }
;;;1321     else
;;;1322     {
;;;1323       tmp_hal_status = HAL_BUSY;
00000c  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
                  |L23.14|
;;;1324     }
;;;1325   
;;;1326     /* Return function status */
;;;1327     return tmp_hal_status;
00000e  4608              MOV      r0,r1
;;;1328   }
000010  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L23.18|
000012  f8940050          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1219
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;1219
000018  d00c              BEQ      |L23.52|
00001a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1219
00001c  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1219
000020  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1222
000022  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Enable
000026  0001              MOVS     r1,r0                 ;1222
000028  f04f0000          MOV      r0,#0                 ;1222
00002c  d004              BEQ      |L23.56|
00002e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1318
000032  e7ec              B        |L23.14|
                  |L23.52|
000034  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1219
000036  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L23.56|
000038  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1230
00003a  f6406301          MOV      r3,#0xe01             ;1230
00003e  439a              BICS     r2,r2,r3              ;1230
000040  f4427280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x100          ;1230
000044  6562              STR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1230
000046  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1248
000048  04d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#19             ;1248
00004a  d504              BPL      |L23.86|
00004c  6da2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x58]         ;1251
00004e  f0220206          BIC      r2,r2,#6              ;1251
000052  65a2              STR      r2,[r4,#0x58]         ;1251
000054  e000              B        |L23.88|
                  |L23.86|
000056  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]         ;1256
                  |L23.88|
000058  6823              LDR      r3,[r4,#0]            ;1261
00005a  221c              MOVS     r2,#0x1c              ;1261
00005c  601a              STR      r2,[r3,#0]            ;1261
00005e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1266
000062  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1306
000064  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1306
000066  0192              LSLS     r2,r2,#6              ;1306
000068  d505              BPL      |L23.118|
00006a  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1308
00006c  f4225200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x2000         ;1308
000070  f4425280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x1000         ;1308
000074  6562              STR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1308
                  |L23.118|
000076  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1308
000078  4b02              LDR      r3,|L23.132|
00007a  401a              ANDS     r2,r2,r3              ;1308
00007c  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4              ;1308
00007e  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1308
000080  e7c5              B        |L23.14|
;;;1329   
                          ENDP

000082  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L23.132|
                          DCD      0x7fffffc0

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Start_DMA||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_Start_DMA PROC
;;;1984     */
;;;1985   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Start_DMA(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc, uint32_t *pData, uint32_t Length)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1986   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  4615              MOV      r5,r2
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
;;;1987     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;1988   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1989     uint32_t tmp_multimode_config = LL_ADC_GetMultimode(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1990   #endif
;;;1991   
;;;1992     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1993     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1994   
;;;1995     /* Perform ADC enable and conversion start if no conversion is on going */
;;;1996     if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000008  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
00000e  bbe0              CBNZ     r0,|L24.138|
;;;1997     {
;;;1998       /* Process locked */
;;;1999       __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000010  f8940050          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
000014  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000016  d042              BEQ      |L24.158|
000018  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00001a  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2000   
;;;2001   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2002       /* Ensure that multimode regular conversions are not enabled.   */
;;;2003       /* Otherwise, dedicated API HAL_ADCEx_MultiModeStart_DMA() must be used.  */
;;;2004       if ((ADC_IS_INDEPENDENT(hadc) != RESET)
;;;2005           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;2006           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;2007           || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;2008          )
;;;2009   #endif /* ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT */
;;;2010       {
;;;2011         /* Enable the ADC peripheral */
;;;2012         tmp_hal_status = ADC_Enable(hadc);
00001e  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000020  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Enable
000024  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000026  b110              CBZ      r0,|L24.46|
;;;2013   
;;;2014         /* Start conversion if ADC is effectively enabled */
;;;2015         if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;2016         {
;;;2017           /* Set ADC state                                                        */
;;;2018           /* - Clear state bitfield related to regular group conversion results   */
;;;2019           /* - Set state bitfield related to regular operation                    */
;;;2020           ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;2021                             HAL_ADC_STATE_READY | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_OVR | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOSMP,
;;;2022                             HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;2023   
;;;2024   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2025           /* Reset HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE bit
;;;2026             - if ADC instance is master or if multimode feature is not available
;;;2027             - if multimode setting is disabled (ADC instance slave in independent mode) */
;;;2028           if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;2029               || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;2030              )
;;;2031           {
;;;2032             CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE);
;;;2033           }
;;;2034   #endif
;;;2035   
;;;2036           /* Check if a conversion is on going on ADC group injected */
;;;2037           if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) != 0UL)
;;;2038           {
;;;2039             /* Reset ADC error code fields related to regular conversions only */
;;;2040             CLEAR_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, (HAL_ADC_ERROR_OVR | HAL_ADC_ERROR_DMA));
;;;2041           }
;;;2042           else
;;;2043           {
;;;2044             /* Reset all ADC error code fields */
;;;2045             ADC_CLEAR_ERRORCODE(hadc);
;;;2046           }
;;;2047   
;;;2048           /* Set the DMA transfer complete callback */
;;;2049           hadc->DMA_Handle->XferCpltCallback = ADC_DMAConvCplt;
;;;2050   
;;;2051           /* Set the DMA half transfer complete callback */
;;;2052           hadc->DMA_Handle->XferHalfCpltCallback = ADC_DMAHalfConvCplt;
;;;2053   
;;;2054           /* Set the DMA error callback */
;;;2055           hadc->DMA_Handle->XferErrorCallback = ADC_DMAError;
;;;2056   
;;;2057   
;;;2058           /* Manage ADC and DMA start: ADC overrun interruption, DMA start,     */
;;;2059           /* ADC start (in case of SW start):                                   */
;;;2060   
;;;2061           /* Clear regular group conversion flag and overrun flag               */
;;;2062           /* (To ensure of no unknown state from potential previous ADC         */
;;;2063           /* operations)                                                        */
;;;2064           __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOC | ADC_FLAG_EOS | ADC_FLAG_OVR));
;;;2065   
;;;2066           /* Process unlocked */
;;;2067           /* Unlock before starting ADC conversions: in case of potential         */
;;;2068           /* interruption, to let the process to ADC IRQ Handler.                 */
;;;2069           __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;2070   
;;;2071           /* With DMA, overrun event is always considered as an error even if
;;;2072              hadc->Init.Overrun is set to ADC_OVR_DATA_OVERWRITTEN. Therefore,
;;;2073              ADC_IT_OVR is enabled. */
;;;2074           __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_OVR);
;;;2075   
;;;2076           /* Enable ADC DMA mode */
;;;2077           SET_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_DMAEN);
;;;2078   
;;;2079           /* Start the DMA channel */
;;;2080           tmp_hal_status = HAL_DMA_Start_IT(hadc->DMA_Handle, (uint32_t)&hadc->Instance->DR, (uint32_t)pData, Length);
;;;2081   
;;;2082           /* Enable conversion of regular group.                                  */
;;;2083           /* If software start has been selected, conversion starts immediately.  */
;;;2084           /* If external trigger has been selected, conversion will start at next */
;;;2085           /* trigger event.                                                       */
;;;2086           /* Start ADC group regular conversion */
;;;2087           LL_ADC_REG_StartConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;2088         }
;;;2089         else
;;;2090         {
;;;2091           /* Process unlocked */
;;;2092           __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
000028  f8841050          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2093         }
;;;2094   
;;;2095       }
;;;2096   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;2097       else
;;;2098       {
;;;2099         tmp_hal_status = HAL_ERROR;
;;;2100         /* Process unlocked */
;;;2101         __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;2102       }
;;;2103   #endif
;;;2104     }
;;;2105     else
;;;2106     {
;;;2107       tmp_hal_status = HAL_BUSY;
;;;2108     }
;;;2109   
;;;2110     /* Return function status */
;;;2111     return tmp_hal_status;
;;;2112   }
00002c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L24.46|
00002e  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2020
000030  f6406201          MOV      r2,#0xe01             ;2020

000036  f4407080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x100          ;2020

                  |L24.76|

000076  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;2077
000078  f0410101          ORR      r1,r1,#1              ;2077
00007c  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;2077

000080  462b              MOV      r3,r5                 ;2080
000082  4632              MOV      r2,r6                 ;2080

000086  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]         ;2080
000088  e000              B        |L24.140|
                  |L24.138|
00008a  e008              B        |L24.158|
                  |L24.140|
00008c  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_DMA_Start_IT
000090  6821              LDR      r1,[r4,#0]            ;2080
000092  688a              LDR      r2,[r1,#8]            ;2080
000094  4b06              LDR      r3,|L24.176|
000096  401a              ANDS     r2,r2,r3              ;2080
000098  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4              ;2080
00009a  608a              STR      r2,[r1,#8]            ;2080
00009c  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L24.158|
00009e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;2107
0000a0  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;2113   
                          ENDP

0000a2  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L24.164|
                          DCD      ADC_DMAConvCplt
                  |L24.168|
                          DCD      ADC_DMAHalfConvCplt
                  |L24.172|
                          DCD      ADC_DMAError
                  |L24.176|
                          DCD      0x7fffffc0

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Start_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  HAL_ADC_Start_IT PROC
;;;1724     */
;;;1725   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Start_IT(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1726   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1727     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;1728   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1729     const ADC_TypeDef *tmpADC_Master;
;;;1730     uint32_t tmp_multimode_config = LL_ADC_GetMultimode(__LL_ADC_COMMON_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1731   #endif
;;;1732   
;;;1733     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1734     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1735   
;;;1736     /* Perform ADC enable and conversion start if no conversion is on going */
;;;1737     if (LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing(hadc->Instance) == 0UL)
000004  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
000006  f7fffffe          BL       LL_ADC_REG_IsConversionOngoing
00000a  b110              CBZ      r0,|L25.18|
;;;1738     {
;;;1739       /* Process locked */
;;;1740       __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
;;;1741   
;;;1742       /* Enable the ADC peripheral */
;;;1743       tmp_hal_status = ADC_Enable(hadc);
;;;1744   
;;;1745       /* Start conversion if ADC is effectively enabled */
;;;1746       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1747       {
;;;1748         /* Set ADC state                                                        */
;;;1749         /* - Clear state bitfield related to regular group conversion results   */
;;;1750         /* - Set state bitfield related to regular operation                    */
;;;1751         ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;1752                           HAL_ADC_STATE_READY | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOC | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_OVR | HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_EOSMP,
;;;1753                           HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY);
;;;1754   
;;;1755   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1756         /* Reset HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE bit
;;;1757           - if ADC instance is master or if multimode feature is not available
;;;1758           - if multimode setting is disabled (ADC instance slave in independent mode) */
;;;1759         if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;1760             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1761            )
;;;1762         {
;;;1763           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE);
;;;1764         }
;;;1765   #endif
;;;1766   
;;;1767         /* Set ADC error code */
;;;1768         /* Check if a conversion is on going on ADC group injected */
;;;1769         if ((hadc->State & HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY) != 0UL)
;;;1770         {
;;;1771           /* Reset ADC error code fields related to regular conversions only */
;;;1772           CLEAR_BIT(hadc->ErrorCode, (HAL_ADC_ERROR_OVR | HAL_ADC_ERROR_DMA));
;;;1773         }
;;;1774         else
;;;1775         {
;;;1776           /* Reset all ADC error code fields */
;;;1777           ADC_CLEAR_ERRORCODE(hadc);
;;;1778         }
;;;1779   
;;;1780         /* Clear ADC group regular conversion flag and overrun flag               */
;;;1781         /* (To ensure of no unknown state from potential previous ADC operations) */
;;;1782         __HAL_ADC_CLEAR_FLAG(hadc, (ADC_FLAG_EOC | ADC_FLAG_EOS | ADC_FLAG_OVR));
;;;1783   
;;;1784         /* Process unlocked */
;;;1785         /* Unlock before starting ADC conversions: in case of potential         */
;;;1786         /* interruption, to let the process to ADC IRQ Handler.                 */
;;;1787         __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1788   
;;;1789         /* Disable all interruptions before enabling the desired ones */
;;;1790         __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, (ADC_IT_EOC | ADC_IT_EOS | ADC_IT_OVR));
;;;1791   
;;;1792         /* Enable ADC end of conversion interrupt */
;;;1793         switch (hadc->Init.EOCSelection)
;;;1794         {
;;;1795           case ADC_EOC_SEQ_CONV:
;;;1796             __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_EOS);
;;;1797             break;
;;;1798           /* case ADC_EOC_SINGLE_CONV */
;;;1799           default:
;;;1800             __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_EOC);
;;;1801             break;
;;;1802         }
;;;1803   
;;;1804         /* Enable ADC overrun interrupt */
;;;1805         /* If hadc->Init.Overrun is set to ADC_OVR_DATA_PRESERVED, only then is
;;;1806            ADC_IT_OVR enabled; otherwise data overwrite is considered as normal
;;;1807            behavior and no CPU time is lost for a non-processed interruption */
;;;1808         if (hadc->Init.Overrun == ADC_OVR_DATA_PRESERVED)
;;;1809         {
;;;1810           __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_OVR);
;;;1811         }
;;;1812   
;;;1813         /* Enable conversion of regular group.                                  */
;;;1814         /* If software start has been selected, conversion starts immediately.  */
;;;1815         /* If external trigger has been selected, conversion will start at next */
;;;1816         /* trigger event.                                                       */
;;;1817         /* Case of multimode enabled (when multimode feature is available):     */
;;;1818         /*  - if ADC is slave and dual regular conversions are enabled, ADC is  */
;;;1819         /*    enabled only (conversion is not started),                         */
;;;1820         /*  - if ADC is master, ADC is enabled and conversion is started.       */
;;;1821   #if defined(ADC_MULTIMODE_SUPPORT)
;;;1822         if ((__LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance) == hadc->Instance)
;;;1823             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_INDEPENDENT)
;;;1824             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_SIMULT)
;;;1825             || (tmp_multimode_config == LL_ADC_MULTI_DUAL_INJ_ALTERN)
;;;1826            )
;;;1827         {
;;;1828           /* ADC instance is not a multimode slave instance with multimode regular conversions enabled */
;;;1829           if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1830           {
;;;1831             ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1832   
;;;1833             /* Enable as well injected interruptions in case
;;;1834              HAL_ADCEx_InjectedStart_IT() has not been called beforehand. This
;;;1835              allows to start regular and injected conversions when JAUTO is
;;;1836              set with a single call to HAL_ADC_Start_IT() */
;;;1837             switch (hadc->Init.EOCSelection)
;;;1838             {
;;;1839               case ADC_EOC_SEQ_CONV:
;;;1840                 __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1841                 __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1842                 break;
;;;1843               /* case ADC_EOC_SINGLE_CONV */
;;;1844               default:
;;;1845                 __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1846                 __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1847                 break;
;;;1848             }
;;;1849           }
;;;1850   
;;;1851           /* Start ADC group regular conversion */
;;;1852           LL_ADC_REG_StartConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;1853         }
;;;1854         else
;;;1855         {
;;;1856           /* ADC instance is a multimode slave instance with multimode regular conversions enabled */
;;;1857           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_MULTIMODE_SLAVE);
;;;1858           /* if Master ADC JAUTO bit is set, Slave injected interruptions
;;;1859              are enabled nevertheless (for same reason as above) */
;;;1860           tmpADC_Master = __LL_ADC_MULTI_INSTANCE_MASTER(hadc->Instance);
;;;1861           if (READ_BIT(tmpADC_Master->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1862           {
;;;1863             /* First, update Slave State in setting HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY bit
;;;1864                and in resetting HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC bit */
;;;1865             ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1866             /* Next, set Slave injected interruptions */
;;;1867             switch (hadc->Init.EOCSelection)
;;;1868             {
;;;1869               case ADC_EOC_SEQ_CONV:
;;;1870                 __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1871                 __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1872                 break;
;;;1873               /* case ADC_EOC_SINGLE_CONV */
;;;1874               default:
;;;1875                 __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1876                 __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1877                 break;
;;;1878             }
;;;1879           }
;;;1880         }
;;;1881   #else
;;;1882         /* ADC instance is not a multimode slave instance with multimode regular conversions enabled */
;;;1883         if (READ_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_JAUTO) != 0UL)
;;;1884         {
;;;1885           ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_EOC, HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY);
;;;1886   
;;;1887           /* Enable as well injected interruptions in case
;;;1888            HAL_ADCEx_InjectedStart_IT() has not been called beforehand. This
;;;1889            allows to start regular and injected conversions when JAUTO is
;;;1890            set with a single call to HAL_ADC_Start_IT() */
;;;1891           switch (hadc->Init.EOCSelection)
;;;1892           {
;;;1893             case ADC_EOC_SEQ_CONV:
;;;1894               __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1895               __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1896               break;
;;;1897             /* case ADC_EOC_SINGLE_CONV */
;;;1898             default:
;;;1899               __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOS);
;;;1900               __HAL_ADC_ENABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_JEOC);
;;;1901               break;
;;;1902           }
;;;1903         }
;;;1904   
;;;1905         /* Start ADC group regular conversion */
;;;1906         LL_ADC_REG_StartConversion(hadc->Instance);
;;;1907   #endif
;;;1908       }
;;;1909       else
;;;1910       {
;;;1911         /* Process unlocked */
;;;1912         __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1913       }
;;;1914   
;;;1915     }
;;;1916     else
;;;1917     {
;;;1918       tmp_hal_status = HAL_BUSY;
00000c  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
                  |L25.14|
;;;1919     }
;;;1920   
;;;1921     /* Return function status */
;;;1922     return tmp_hal_status;
00000e  4608              MOV      r0,r1
;;;1923   }
000010  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L25.18|
000012  f8940050          LDRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1740
000016  2801              CMP      r0,#1                 ;1740
000018  d00c              BEQ      |L25.52|
00001a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1740
00001c  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1740
000020  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1743
000022  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Enable
000026  0001              MOVS     r1,r0                 ;1743
000028  f04f0000          MOV      r0,#0                 ;1743
00002c  d004              BEQ      |L25.56|
00002e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1912
000032  e7ec              B        |L25.14|
                  |L25.52|
000034  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1740
000036  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L25.56|
000038  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1751
00003a  f6406301          MOV      r3,#0xe01             ;1751
00003e  439a              BICS     r2,r2,r3              ;1751
000040  f4427280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x100          ;1751
000044  6562              STR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1751
000046  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1769
000048  04d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#19             ;1769
00004a  d504              BPL      |L25.86|
00004c  6da2              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x58]         ;1772
00004e  f0220206          BIC      r2,r2,#6              ;1772
000052  65a2              STR      r2,[r4,#0x58]         ;1772
000054  e000              B        |L25.88|
                  |L25.86|
000056  65a0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x58]         ;1777
                  |L25.88|
000058  6823              LDR      r3,[r4,#0]            ;1782
00005a  221c              MOVS     r2,#0x1c              ;1782

00005e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;1787
000062  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1790
000064  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1790
000066  f022021c          BIC      r2,r2,#0x1c           ;1790
00006a  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1790
00006c  6960              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x14]         ;1793
00006e  2808              CMP      r0,#8                 ;1793
000070  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1796
000072  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1796
000074  d002              BEQ      |L25.124|
000076  f0420204          ORR      r2,r2,#4              ;1800
00007a  e001              B        |L25.128|
                  |L25.124|
00007c  f0420208          ORR      r2,r2,#8              ;1796
                  |L25.128|

000082  6b60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x34]         ;1808
000084  b920              CBNZ     r0,|L25.144|
000086  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1810
000088  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1810
00008a  f0420210          ORR      r2,r2,#0x10           ;1810
00008e  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1810
                  |L25.144|
000090  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1883
000092  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]          ;1883
000094  0192              LSLS     r2,r2,#6              ;1883
000096  d519              BPL      |L25.204|
000098  6d62              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1885
00009a  f4225200          BIC      r2,r2,#0x2000         ;1885
00009e  f4425280          ORR      r2,r2,#0x1000         ;1885
0000a2  6562              STR      r2,[r4,#0x54]         ;1885
0000a4  6962              LDR      r2,[r4,#0x14]         ;1891
0000a6  2a08              CMP      r2,#8                 ;1891
0000a8  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1894
0000aa  d007              BEQ      |L25.188|

0000b0  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1899
0000b2  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1900
0000b4  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1900
0000b6  f0420220          ORR      r2,r2,#0x20           ;1900
0000ba  e006              B        |L25.202|
                  |L25.188|
0000bc  f0220220          BIC      r2,r2,#0x20           ;1894
0000c0  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1894
0000c2  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1895
0000c4  6842              LDR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1895
0000c6  f0420240          ORR      r2,r2,#0x40           ;1895
                  |L25.202|
0000ca  6042              STR      r2,[r0,#4]            ;1900
                  |L25.204|
0000cc  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1900
0000ce  6882              LDR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1900
0000d0  4b02              LDR      r3,|L25.220|
0000d2  401a              ANDS     r2,r2,r3              ;1900
0000d4  1d12              ADDS     r2,r2,#4              ;1900
0000d6  6082              STR      r2,[r0,#8]            ;1900
0000d8  e799              B        |L25.14|
;;;1924   
                          ENDP

0000da  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L25.220|
                          DCD      0x7fffffc0

                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Stop||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_Stop PROC
;;;1338     */
;;;1339   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Stop(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1340   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1341     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;1342   
;;;1343     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1344     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1345   
;;;1346     /* Process locked */
;;;1347     __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000004  f8900050          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x50]
000008  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00000a  d008              BEQ      |L26.30|
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;1348   
;;;1349     /* 1. Stop potential conversion on going, on ADC groups regular and injected */
;;;1350     tmp_hal_status = ADC_ConversionStop(hadc, ADC_REGULAR_INJECTED_GROUP);
000012  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_ConversionStop
00001a  b110              CBZ      r0,|L26.34|
00001c  e00b              B        |L26.54|
                  |L26.30|
00001e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1347
;;;1351   
;;;1352     /* Disable ADC peripheral if conversions are effectively stopped */
;;;1353     if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1354     {
;;;1355       /* 2. Disable the ADC peripheral */
;;;1356       tmp_hal_status = ADC_Disable(hadc);
;;;1357   
;;;1358       /* Check if ADC is effectively disabled */
;;;1359       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1360       {
;;;1361         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1362         ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;1363                           HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY | HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY,
;;;1364                           HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;1365       }
;;;1366     }
;;;1367   
;;;1368     /* Process unlocked */
;;;1369     __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1370   
;;;1371     /* Return function status */
;;;1372     return tmp_hal_status;
;;;1373   }
000020  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L26.34|
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1356
000024  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Disable
000028  b928              CBNZ     r0,|L26.54|
00002a  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;1362
00002c  f4215188          BIC      r1,r1,#0x1100         ;1362
000030  f0410101          ORR      r1,r1,#1              ;1362
000034  6561              STR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;1362
                  |L26.54|
000036  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;1369
000038  f8841050          STRB     r1,[r4,#0x50]         ;1369
00003c  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1374   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Stop_DMA||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_Stop_DMA PROC
;;;2126     */
;;;2127   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Stop_DMA(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;2128   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;2129     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;2130   
;;;2131     /* Check the parameters */
;;;2132     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;2133   
;;;2134     /* Process locked */
;;;2135     __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000004  f8900050          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x50]
000008  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00000a  d009              BEQ      |L27.32|
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;2136   
;;;2137     /* 1. Stop potential ADC group regular conversion on going */
;;;2138     tmp_hal_status = ADC_ConversionStop(hadc, ADC_REGULAR_INJECTED_GROUP);
000012  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_ConversionStop
00001a  0005              MOVS     r5,r0
00001c  d002              BEQ      |L27.36|
00001e  e027              B        |L27.112|
                  |L27.32|
000020  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;2135
;;;2139   
;;;2140     /* Disable ADC peripheral if conversions are effectively stopped */
;;;2141     if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;2142     {
;;;2143       /* Disable ADC DMA (ADC DMA configuration of continuous requests is kept) */
;;;2144       CLEAR_BIT(hadc->Instance->CFGR, ADC_CFGR_DMAEN);
;;;2145   
;;;2146       /* Disable the DMA channel (in case of DMA in circular mode or stop       */
;;;2147       /* while DMA transfer is on going)                                        */
;;;2148       if (hadc->DMA_Handle->State == HAL_DMA_STATE_BUSY)
;;;2149       {
;;;2150         tmp_hal_status = HAL_DMA_Abort(hadc->DMA_Handle);
;;;2151   
;;;2152         /* Check if DMA channel effectively disabled */
;;;2153         if (tmp_hal_status != HAL_OK)
;;;2154         {
;;;2155           /* Update ADC state machine to error */
;;;2156           SET_BIT(hadc->State, HAL_ADC_STATE_ERROR_DMA);
;;;2157         }
;;;2158       }
;;;2159   
;;;2160       /* Disable ADC overrun interrupt */
;;;2161       __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, ADC_IT_OVR);
;;;2162   
;;;2163       /* 2. Disable the ADC peripheral */
;;;2164       /* Update "tmp_hal_status" only if DMA channel disabling passed,          */
;;;2165       /* to keep in memory a potential failing status.                          */
;;;2166       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;2167       {
;;;2168         tmp_hal_status = ADC_Disable(hadc);
;;;2169       }
;;;2170       else
;;;2171       {
;;;2172         (void)ADC_Disable(hadc);
;;;2173       }
;;;2174   
;;;2175       /* Check if ADC is effectively disabled */
;;;2176       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;2177       {
;;;2178         /* Set ADC state */
;;;2179         ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;2180                           HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY | HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY,
;;;2181                           HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;2182       }
;;;2183   
;;;2184     }
;;;2185   
;;;2186     /* Process unlocked */
;;;2187     __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;2188   
;;;2189     /* Return function status */
;;;2190     return tmp_hal_status;
;;;2191   }
000022  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L27.36|
000024  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;2144
000026  68c1              LDR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;2144
000028  f0210101          BIC      r1,r1,#1              ;2144
00002c  60c1              STR      r1,[r0,#0xc]          ;2144
00002e  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]         ;2148

000034  2902              CMP      r1,#2                 ;2148
000036  d107              BNE      |L27.72|
000038  f7fffffe          BL       HAL_DMA_Abort
00003c  0005              MOVS     r5,r0                 ;2150
00003e  d003              BEQ      |L27.72|
000040  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2156
000042  f0400040          ORR      r0,r0,#0x40           ;2156
000046  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2156
                  |L27.72|
000048  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;2161

00004c  f0210110          BIC      r1,r1,#0x10           ;2161
000050  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;2161
000052  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;2172
000054  b115              CBZ      r5,|L27.92|
000056  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Disable
00005a  e009              B        |L27.112|
                  |L27.92|
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Disable
000060  0005              MOVS     r5,r0                 ;2168
000062  d105              BNE      |L27.112|
000064  6d60              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2179
000066  f4205088          BIC      r0,r0,#0x1100         ;2179
00006a  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1              ;2179
00006e  6560              STR      r0,[r4,#0x54]         ;2179
                  |L27.112|
000070  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;2187
000072  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]         ;2187
000076  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;2190
000078  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;2192   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.HAL_ADC_Stop_IT||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  HAL_ADC_Stop_IT PROC
;;;1931     */
;;;1932   HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ADC_Stop_IT(ADC_HandleTypeDef *hadc)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1933   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1934     HAL_StatusTypeDef tmp_hal_status;
;;;1935   
;;;1936     /* Check the parameters */
;;;1937     assert_param(IS_ADC_ALL_INSTANCE(hadc->Instance));
;;;1938   
;;;1939     /* Process locked */
;;;1940     __HAL_LOCK(hadc);
000004  f8900050          LDRB     r0,[r0,#0x50]
000008  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00000a  d008              BEQ      |L28.30|
00000c  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
00000e  f8840050          STRB     r0,[r4,#0x50]
;;;1941   
;;;1942     /* 1. Stop potential conversion on going, on ADC groups regular and injected */
;;;1943     tmp_hal_status = ADC_ConversionStop(hadc, ADC_REGULAR_INJECTED_GROUP);
000012  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000014  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000016  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_ConversionStop
00001a  b110              CBZ      r0,|L28.34|
00001c  e010              B        |L28.64|
                  |L28.30|
00001e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2                 ;1940
;;;1944   
;;;1945     /* Disable ADC peripheral if conversions are effectively stopped */
;;;1946     if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1947     {
;;;1948       /* Disable ADC end of conversion interrupt for regular group */
;;;1949       /* Disable ADC overrun interrupt */
;;;1950       __HAL_ADC_DISABLE_IT(hadc, (ADC_IT_EOC | ADC_IT_EOS | ADC_IT_OVR));
;;;1951   
;;;1952       /* 2. Disable the ADC peripheral */
;;;1953       tmp_hal_status = ADC_Disable(hadc);
;;;1954   
;;;1955       /* Check if ADC is effectively disabled */
;;;1956       if (tmp_hal_status == HAL_OK)
;;;1957       {
;;;1958         /* Set ADC state */
;;;1959         ADC_STATE_CLR_SET(hadc->State,
;;;1960                           HAL_ADC_STATE_REG_BUSY | HAL_ADC_STATE_INJ_BUSY,
;;;1961                           HAL_ADC_STATE_READY);
;;;1962       }
;;;1963     }
;;;1964   
;;;1965     /* Process unlocked */
;;;1966     __HAL_UNLOCK(hadc);
;;;1967   
;;;1968     /* Return function status */
;;;1969     return tmp_hal_status;
;;;1970   }
000020  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
                  |L28.34|
000022  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]            ;1950
000024  6841              LDR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;1950
000026  f021011c          BIC      r1,r1,#0x1c           ;1950
00002a  6041              STR      r1,[r0,#4]            ;1950
00002c  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1953
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       ADC_Disable
000032  b928              CBNZ     r0,|L28.64|
000034  6d61              LDR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;1959
000036  f4215188          BIC      r1,r1,#0x1100         ;1959
00003a  f0410101          ORR      r1,r1,#1              ;1959
00003e  6561              STR      r1,[r4,#0x54]         ;1959
                  |L28.64|

000046  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;1971   
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.LL_ADC_ConfigAnalogWDThresholds||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  LL_ADC_ConfigAnalogWDThresholds PROC
;;;5320     */
;;;5321   __STATIC_INLINE void LL_ADC_ConfigAnalogWDThresholds(ADC_TypeDef *ADCx, uint32_t AWDy, uint32_t AWDThresholdHighValue,
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;5322                                                        uint32_t AWDThresholdLowValue)
;;;5323   {
;;;5324     /* Set bits with content of parameter "AWDThresholdxxxValue" with bits      */
;;;5325     /* position in register and register position depending on parameter        */
;;;5326     /* "AWDy".                                                                  */
;;;5327     /* Parameters "AWDy" and "AWDThresholdxxxValue" are used with masks because */
;;;5328     /* containing other bits reserved for other purpose.                        */
;;;5329     __IO uint32_t *preg = __ADC_PTR_REG_OFFSET(ADCx->TR1, ((AWDy & ADC_AWD_TRX_REGOFFSET_MASK) >> ADC_AWD_TRX_REGOFFSET_POS));

000004  ea044191          AND      r1,r4,r1,LSR #18
000008  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
;;;5330   
;;;5331     MODIFY_REG(*preg,
00000a  6a01              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
00000c  ea434202          ORR      r2,r3,r2,LSL #16
000010  f00121f0          AND      r1,r1,#0xf000f000
000014  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
000016  6201              STR      r1,[r0,#0x20]
;;;5332                ADC_TR1_HT1 | ADC_TR1_LT1,
;;;5333                (AWDThresholdHighValue << ADC_TR1_HT1_BITOFFSET_POS) | AWDThresholdLowValue);
;;;5334   }
000018  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;5335   
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i.LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels PROC
;;;5076     */
;;;5077   __STATIC_INLINE void LL_ADC_SetAnalogWDMonitChannels(ADC_TypeDef *ADCx, uint32_t AWDy, uint32_t AWDChannelGroup)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;5078   {
;;;5079     /* Set bits with content of parameter "AWDChannelGroup" with bits position  */
;;;5080     /* in register and register position depending on parameter "AWDy".         */
;;;5081     /* Parameters "AWDChannelGroup" and "AWDy" are used with masks because      */
;;;5082     /* containing other bits reserved for other purpose.                        */
;;;5083     __IO uint32_t *preg = __ADC_PTR_REG_OFFSET(ADCx->CFGR, ((AWDy & ADC_AWD_CRX_REGOFFSET_MASK) >> ADC_AWD_CRX_REGOFFSET_POS)

000006  eb0303c3          ADD      r3,r3,r3,LSL #3
00000a  f3c15401          UBFX     r4,r1,#20,#2
00000e  eb040383          ADD      r3,r4,r3,LSL #2
000012  eb000083          ADD      r0,r0,r3,LSL #2
;;;5084                                                + ((AWDy & ADC_AWD_CR12_REGOFFSETGAP_MASK) * ADC_AWD_CR12_REGOFFSETGAP_VAL));
;;;5085   
;;;5086     MODIFY_REG(*preg,
000016  68c3              LDR      r3,[r0,#0xc]
000018  4c03              LDR      r4,|L34.40|
00001a  400a              ANDS     r2,r2,r1
00001c  400c              ANDS     r4,r4,r1
00001e  43a3              BICS     r3,r3,r4
000020  4313              ORRS     r3,r3,r2
000022  60c3              STR      r3,[r0,#0xc]
;;;5087                (AWDy & ADC_AWD_CR_ALL_CHANNEL_MASK),
;;;5088                AWDChannelGroup & AWDy);
;;;5089   }
000024  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;5090   
                          ENDP

000026  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L34.40|

;;;4717   {

;;;4720     /* Parameter "Channel" is used with masks because containing                */
;;;4721     /* other bits reserved for other purpose.                                   */

00001a  6143              STR      r3,[r0,#0x14]
